    • Server records to fire_checks and returns { ok, locationName, kind }.

So, if Fire Tap “doesn’t work” for you today, it’s almost certainly because the Tap is posting to http://www.ernosapp.com (from your .env) instead of your real API. Fix in section A will resolve that.

Quick sanity checklist after you patch

  1. Restart the server after changing .env.

  2. Open a tag URL like http://localhost:5055/tap/u/<token> (or the printed QR).

  3. If you’re not signed in, you’ll be sent to /app.html (your SPA) — sign in there.

  4. You’ll be bounced back (because you keep ernos_return_to) and now the Tap page will call the right API base and work:

    • Fridge: enter a temp → “Saved …°C at …”

    • Fire: pick kind/note → “Saved DRILL/PANEL/EXTINGUISHER at …”

  5. Try with a Housekeeping user:

    • Fridge → 403 before the change, OK after the one-line role addition.

    • Fire → OK both before/after (no role gate in backend).

Notes on “stay logged in”

  • With the change in C1/C2, unchecking “Keep me signed in” will store the token in sessionStorage (clears when the tab or browser closes).

  • Checking it will store to localStorage (persists across restarts).

  • Both SPAs will read from sessionStorage first, then localStorage, so the most recent token wins.

If you want me to also wire a Tap page for Reception/Visit or adjust CORS to support cross-origin posting, say the word — but the above is the smallest set of precise edits to get your current flows working.

You said:

### C1) Update the “full” SPA (your big HTML) **File:** your large SPA file (the long `<script type="module">` inside your HTML that already has “Remember” support on the login screen) **1\. Replace the `setToken` function with this version (stores to localStorage or sessionStorage depending on remember flag you saved):** js Copy code `function setToken(t){ state.token = t || ""; try { const remember = localStorage.getItem('ernosRemember') === '1'; if (remember) { localStorage.setItem('ernosToken', state.token); sessionStorage.removeItem('ernosToken'); } else { sessionStorage.setItem('ernosToken', state.token); localStorage.removeItem('ernosToken'); } } catch {} }` **2\. Replace the initial token load (near the top where `state` is defined) with this:** js Copy code `const state = { api: localStorage.getItem('ernosApi') || PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK || location.origin, token: (sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ""), me: null };` > You already persist the “remember” checkbox value to `localStorage.ernosRemember` after login — this code now actually uses it.

again exact location!!!
ChatGPT said:

Totally—here are the exact file paths / code fragments to find and replace, line-perfect, using strings that exist in the code you pasted.

1) Point the Tap pages at the right API

File: .env (project root)

Find this line (it’s already in your .env):

ini
PUBLIC_API_URL=http://www.ernosapp.com

Replace it with exactly:

makefile
PUBLIC_API_URL=

Then restart the server. With this empty value, the Tap pages default to location.origin, which matches the server that’s serving /tap/* and /ff/*.

2) Allow HOUSEKEEPING to use the Fridge tap (optional but you asked)

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs (your paste shows // plugins/fridge_fire.cjs at the top)

Search for the Fridge write endpoint (unique header):

js
/* ---------- Fridge API ---------- */
app.post("/ff/fridge/log", auth, async (req, res) => {

Inside that handler, find this exact access block:

js
// Access: only NURSING (or Admins) can write
const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
  return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
}

Replace that whole block with:

js
// Access: NURSING or HOUSEKEEPING or Admins
const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING" || c === "HOUSEKEEPING")) {
  return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
}

Nothing else in this file needs to change for taps.

3) “Stay signed in” — make the checkbox actually control persistence

You have two SPA scripts. Do both edits.

3A) The big SPA (the long HTML file with <script type="module"> and a “Remember” checkbox)

File: the large HTML you pasted (looks like your main app shell).
(If it lives at frontend/app.html, edit that.)

3A-1. Replace the state initializer

Find this exact block (near the top of the <script type="module">):

js
const PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK=(window.ERNOS_PUBLIC_API_URL||"").replace(/\/+$/,'');
const state={ api: localStorage.getItem('ernosApi')||PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK||location.origin, token: localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||"", me:null };

Replace it with:

js
const PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK=(window.ERNOS_PUBLIC_API_URL||"").replace(/\/+$/,'');
const state={
  api: localStorage.getItem('ernosApi')||PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK||location.origin,
  token: (sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ""),
  me: null
};

3A-2. Replace setToken

Find this exact function (it appears a little below):

js
function setToken(t){ state.token=t||""; try{ localStorage.setItem('ernosToken',state.token) }catch{} }

Replace it with:

js
function setToken(t){
  state.token = t || "";
  try {
    const remember = localStorage.getItem('ernosRemember') === '1';
    if (remember) {
      localStorage.setItem('ernosToken', state.token);
      sessionStorage.removeItem('ernosToken');
    } else {
      sessionStorage.setItem('ernosToken', state.token);
      localStorage.removeItem('ernosToken');
    }
  } catch {}
}

You’re already saving the checkbox to localStorage.ernosRemember right after a successful login in viewLogin() — this edit now uses it to decide where to store the token.

3B) The small SPA (// Ernos SPA (no-build). Uses hash routing…)

File: the other <script> you pasted (shorter one).
(Wherever you host this—edit that file.)

3B-1. Replace the state initializer

Find:

js
const state = {
  api: localStorage.getItem("ernosApi") || PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK || location.origin,
  token: localStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || "",
  me: null,
};

Replace with:

js
const state = {
  api: localStorage.getItem("ernosApi") || PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK || location.origin,
  token: (sessionStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || localStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || ""),
  me: null,
};

3B-2. Replace setToken

Find:

js
function setToken(t) {
  state.token = t || "";
  try { localStorage.setItem("ernosToken", state.token); } catch {}
}

Replace with:

js
function setToken(t){
  state.token = t || "";
  try {
    const remember = localStorage.getItem('ernosRemember') === '1';
    if (remember) {
      localStorage.setItem('ernosToken', state.token);
      sessionStorage.removeItem('ernosToken');
    } else {
      sessionStorage.setItem('ernosToken', state.token);
      localStorage.removeItem('ernosToken');
    }
  } catch {}
}

This smaller SPA doesn’t show a “Remember” checkbox. If you want it to always persist, add this one line in the login handler just before setToken(j.token);:

js
try { localStorage.setItem('ernosRemember','1'); } catch {}

(or add an actual checkbox like the big SPA and save it the same way.)

4) What each Tap should do (so you know what to expect)

  • /tap/u/:token – server looks up qrcodes → locations.type and redirects to:

    • FRIDGE → /tap/fridge/:token

    • FIRE → /tap/fire/:token

    • RECEPTION → /tap/reception/:token (you said this one already works)

    • ROOM / ASSET → /tap/visit/:token

  • /tap/fridge/:token – needs login; allows NURSING (and Admins).
    If you do step #2, it will also allow HOUSEKEEPING.

  • /tap/fire/:token – needs login; no role gate (any signed-in user can save).

If Fire/Fridge weren’t working before, it was the .env PUBLIC_API_URL pointing to http://www.ernosapp.com. Clearing that fixes the base URL so the pages POST to your live API.

That’s it. Make those edits in those exact spots, restart the server, and re-test a QR (or go to /tap/u/<token>).

You said:
I asked you to check what exactly housekeeping can see when they tap the NFC tag or scan Qr code in the room??
ChatGPT said:

Short answer: with the code you gave me, HOUSEKEEPING doesn’t have its own Tap. What they actually see depends on the tag type:

What HOUSEKEEPING sees today (exactly)

1) ROOM / ASSET tags

  • Flow: /tap/u/:token → redirects to /tap/visit/:token

  • File that does this: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs

    js
    // plugins/fridge_fire.cjs  (search "/tap/u/:token")
if (t === "ROOM" || t === "ASSET") {
  // If you have a visitors tap page:
  return res.redirect(302, `/tap/visit/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
}

  • Reality: There is no /tap/visit/:token page in the code you sent.
    So HOUSEKEEPING (or anyone) tapping a ROOM/ASSET tag lands on 404 / not found (unless you have this route elsewhere).

2) FRIDGE tags

  • Flow: /tap/u/:token → redirects to /tap/fridge/:token

  • Page checks role before saving (client-side in the generated HTML).

  • File & message text: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs → the fridge tap page template:

    js
    // inside the fridge tap HTML <script>
if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING")){
  msg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing.", "err");
  return;
}

  • What HOUSEKEEPING sees: The page loads, but when it checks /ff/me, it blocks them with the on-screen message
    “Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing.”
    They cannot submit fridge temperatures.

3) FIRE tags

  • Flow: /tap/u/:token → redirects to /tap/fire/:token

  • Server handler: POST /ff/fire/check does not restrict by role (only auth).

    js
    // plugins/fridge_fire.cjs  (search 'app.post("/ff/fire/check"')
// no role/category gate here — any logged-in user can save a fire check

  • What HOUSEKEEPING sees: A page with:

    • a select (“Fire panel / Extinguisher / Emergency drill completed”),

    • a textarea for note,

    • a Save button.
      And it works for them (they’re allowed to save).

4) RECEPTION tags (Visitors)

  • Flow: /tap/u/:token → redirects to /tap/reception/:token

  • You said this one works; that route/page isn’t in the code you pasted, so it must be in another plugin/file. Nothing in the files here changes that.

So… what “Housekeeping Tap” should do (with current code)?

There is no Housekeeping-specific tap implemented. The only implemented Tap pages in the code you sent are:

  • Fridge (NURSING/Admin only; HOUSEKEEPING blocked),

  • Fire (any logged-in user, including HOUSEKEEPING),

  • Reception/Visitors (implemented elsewhere and working),

  • Room/Asset is just a redirect to a missing /tap/visit/:token page.

If you want a Housekeeping workflow on ROOM tags (e.g., record cleaning checks), you need an actual /tap/visit/:token (or /tap/housekeeping/:token) page and a matching API. Those do not exist in the files you provided.

Where to read the exact behaviors in your code

  • Auto-router (which tap a token goes to):
    plugins/fridge_fire.cjs → search app.get("/tap/u/:token",

  • Fridge tap page & its role gate & the “Access denied…” text:
    plugins/fridge_fire.cjs → search app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", then inside the HTML <script> block, search fridge logging is for Nursing.

  • Fire tap page & POST endpoint (no role gate):
    plugins/fridge_fire.cjs → search app.get("/tap/fire/:token", (page) and app.post("/ff/fire/check", (server save)

  • Fridge save API (server role gate NURSING/Admin only):
    plugins/fridge_fire.cjs → search app.post("/ff/fridge/log", then see:

    js
    if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
  return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
}

TL;DR for QA

  • HOUSEKEEPING + ROOM tag: goes to /tap/visit → missing → 404.

  • HOUSEKEEPING + FRIDGE tag: page opens, but shows “Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing.”

  • HOUSEKEEPING + FIRE tag: works (they can submit a fire check).

  • RECEPTION tag: works (implemented elsewhere).

If you want me to wire up a working Room/Housekeeping tap (page + API) or to permit HOUSEKEEPING on Fridge tap, say the word and I’ll give you exact file/line inserts.

You said:
if I give you previous server can you check then what option shousekeeping had, or nay other role like, what the fuck is happening, this visit token is fucking verything else, in previous verion ot the app it worked perfectly,
ChatGPT said:

Got it — I can totally check the previous server if you paste it. In the meantime, here’s what’s breaking right now and how to fix it with exact, minimal patches.

What’s broken (summary)

  1. ROOM / ASSET tap tokens

    • Your auto-resolver sends them to /tap/visit/:token, but that route doesn’t exist in the current code you gave me. Result: 404 → “Housekeeping tap doesn’t work”.

  2. HOUSEKEEPING on Fridge tap

    • The client page blocks everyone except Nursing/Admin.

    • The server also blocks everyone except Nursing/Admin.

    • Result: Housekeeping can’t log fridge temps.

  3. Stay signed in (“remember me”)

    • The first HTML app has a “Keep me signed in” checkbox, but the value is only saved as localStorage.ernosRemember. There is no refresh-token flow; the token is always stored in localStorage anyway. Users stay signed in until the JWT expires. The “remember” flag currently doesn’t extend a session on the server.

  4. Password setting

    • Admin reset forces must_change_password = TRUE (good).

    • Creating a user:

      • Server requires min 5 chars.

      • New SPA UI requires min 8 chars (stricter UI than server, that’s fine).

    • “Change my password” endpoint clears the must-change flag (good).

    • The apps check /me/mcp and force you to Settings if must_change_password is true (good).

Fixes (exact, surgical)

A) Make ROOM/ASSET tokens work immediately (no changes to Reception)

Option 1 (safest & keeps old links alive): add a redirect route /tap/visit/:token → /tap/reception/:token

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs
Location: anywhere after other app.get(...) tap routes (e.g., right under the existing /tap/u/:token route is fine), but before the final module.exports closing brace.

Add this block verbatim:

js
// Back-compat for older ROOM/ASSET tokens that used /tap/visit
app.get("/tap/visit/:token", (req, res) => {
  // We don't implement a separate /tap/visit page in this version;
  // send them to the Reception/Visitors tap, which you said works.
  const token = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
  return res.redirect(302, `/tap/reception/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
});

This preserves all existing QR/NFCs that point at /tap/visit/* and uses your working Reception tap page.

Option 2 (alternative): change the auto-resolver branch for ROOM/ASSET

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs
Find: the /tap/u/:token handler. Inside it, locate:

js
if (t === "ROOM" || t === "ASSET") {
  // If you have a visitors tap page:
  return res.redirect(302, `/tap/visit/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
}

Replace the block above with:

js
if (t === "ROOM" || t === "ASSET") {
  // Send ROOM/ASSET to the Reception tap that already works
  return res.redirect(302, `/tap/reception/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
}

Either Option 1 or Option 2 is enough. I recommend Option 1 so both /tap/u/:token and any hardcoded /tap/visit/:token continue to work.

B) Let HOUSEKEEPING use the Fridge tap (if that’s intended)

You said you’re testing “housekeeping one” — if you want Housekeeping to log fridge temps:

B1) Allow on the client page (remove the “Access denied”)

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs
Find: the Fridge tap page route app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", ...).
Inside the big HTML string, locate the inline <script> block and then this check:

js
if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING")){
  msg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing.", "err");
  return;
}

Replace it with:

js
if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING"||c==="HOUSEKEEPING")){
  msg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing/Housekeeping.", "err");
  return;
}

B2) Allow on the server API (so the POST doesn’t 403)

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs
Find: the handler app.post("/ff/fridge/log", auth, async (req, res) => { ... })
Inside it, locate the access check:

js
const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
  return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
}

Replace it with:

js
const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING" || c === "HOUSEKEEPING")) {
  return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
}

After these two changes, Housekeeping can open the Fridge tap and save temps successfully.

C) Clarify “stay logged in”

Right now both frontends (your big app.html and the SPA block) always store the JWT in localStorage when login succeeds. There’s no refresh token. So:

  • Users stay signed in until the JWT expires on the server.

  • The “Keep me signed in” UI flag (in the first app) is only saved as localStorage.ernosRemember and isn’t sent to the server (except in one older form where it’s passed to /auth/login, but the server code you gave me doesn’t use it for session lifetimes).

  • If you want real “remember me”, the server needs either:

    • a longer-lived JWT when remember=true, or

    • a refresh-token flow (issue refresh cookie + short-lived access token).

Nothing in your pasted backend handles token refresh or per-login lifetimes.

Extra checks done for you

  • Fire tap: works for any logged-in user (server endpoint has no role gate). That matches what your Housekeeping folks can do today.

  • Reception tap: you said it works; it isn’t in these files, so I didn’t touch it.

  • Password flows:

    • Admin reset → must-change enforced (good).

    • First login must-change redirect → present and working (both UIs call /me/mcp).

    • Self-change clears must-change (good).

    • Minor mismatch 5 vs 8 chars between server vs UI → not harmful.

If you share the previous server, I’ll pinpoint exactly what “Housekeeping” did there

Specifically I’ll look for:

  • any /tap/visit or /tap/housekeeping route/page,

  • what it wrote to (e.g., a housekeeping table),

  • any special role gates that got lost.

But you don’t have to wait — the patches above will immediately:

  • restore ROOM/ASSET taps (by redirecting to your working Reception tap),

  • enable Housekeeping on Fridge taps (if you want that).

You said:
here it is the logic of the tokens, so you tell me what do you see the re in thi// =============================== // File: tap.routes.cjs // Extracted TAP / Token routes for Ernos (Nursing • HK/Maint • Admin/Auditor) // =============================== const express = require("express"); // ---- tiny utils (lifted from your server) ---- function nowISO() { return new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d{3}Z$/, "Z"); } function normalizeToken(raw) { let t = String(raw || "").trim(); try { t = decodeURIComponent(t); } catch (_) {} if (t.startsWith("#")) t = t.slice(1); if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(t)) { const parts = t.split("#"); t = parts[1] || t.split("/").pop(); } if (/^ci\//i.test(t)) t = t.slice(3); if (/^reception\//i.test(t)) t = t.slice(10); if (/^env\//i.test(t)) t = t.slice(4); if (t.includes("/")) t = t.split("/").pop(); return t; } function makeTokenString() { return Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10) + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 6); } function tenantIdOf(req) { return Number(req.user?.tenant_id || 0); } // ---- exported registrar ---- function registerTapRoutes(app, { pool, auth, requireAdmin, PUBLIC_API_URL = "", PUBLIC_WEB_URL = "" }) { // ================= QR / NFC ================= // Create a QR/NFC token for a location (ADMIN only). Picks a TAP URL by location type. app.post("/qrcodes", auth, requireAdmin, async (req, res) => { const tid = tenantIdOf(req); const { locationId } = req.body || {}; if (!locationId) return res.status(400).json({ error: "locationId required" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query( "SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1 AND tenant_id=$2", [locationId, tid] ); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const tok = makeTokenString(); await pool.query( "INSERT INTO qrcodes(token,location_id,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3)", [tok, locationId, tid] ); const hostProto = req.get("x-forwarded-proto") || (req.secure ? "https" : "http"); const hostName = req.get("host"); const computed = ${hostProto}://${hostName}; const base = (PUBLIC_API_URL || computed).replace(/\/+$/, ""); const tapAuto = base + "/tap/u/" + tok; // role-aware redirect const tapEnv = base + "/tap/env/" + tok; // auditor adds location to current audit const tapCi = base + "/tap/ci/" + tok; // HK/Maint toggle check in/out + issue const tapRec = base + "/tap/reception/" + tok; const loc = locRows[0]; const type = String(loc.type || "").toUpperCase(); // Convenience for typed flows const urlTapFridge = base + "/tap/fridge/" + tok; // (reserved) const urlTapFire = base + "/tap/fire/" + tok; // (reserved) let tap = tapAuto; if (type === "RECEPTION") tap = tapRec; else if (type === "FRIDGE") tap = urlTapFridge; else if (type === "FIRE") tap = urlTapFire; res.json({ token: tok, urlTap: tap, urlTapAuto: tapAuto, urlTapEnv: tapEnv, urlTapCi: tapCi, urlTapReception: tapRec, urlTapFridge, urlTapFire, }); }); // ================= TAP PERFORM (HK/Nursing/Maint) ================= // Housekeeping / Maintenance / Nursing toggle check-in/out at a location app.post("/tap/ci/perform", auth, async (req, res) => { const { token } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const qr = qrRows[0]; const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [req.user.id]); if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" }); const u = userRows[0]; // If same user has open visit at this location -> checkout const { rows: openRows } = await pool.query( SELECT * FROM checkins WHERE user_id=$1 AND location_id=$2 AND checkout_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1, [u.id, loc.id] ); if (openRows.length) { const open = openRows[0]; const end = nowISO(); await pool.query("UPDATE checkins SET checkout_at=$1 WHERE id=$2", [end, open.id]); const { rows: d } = await pool.query( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(checkout_at, NOW()) - checkin_at))/60 AS minutes FROM checkins WHERE id=$1, [open.id] ); const durationMin = d[0]?.minutes != null ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(d[0].minutes))) : null; return res.json({ ok: true, action: "checkout", role: u.category || "", locationName: loc.name, started_at: open.checkin_at, ended_at: end, durationMin, }); } // else -> check in const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const ins = await pool.query( INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9) RETURNING id, [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, u.category || "", loc.name, tid] ); return res.json({ ok: true, action: "checkin", role: u.category || "", locationName: loc.name, checkinId: ins.rows[0].id, started_at: nowISO(), }); }); // Nursing one-shot (no toggle): records a nursing check at a location app.post("/tap/nursing/check", auth, async (req, res) => { const { token } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const qr = qrRows[0]; const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [req.user.id]); if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" }); const u = userRows[0]; const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); await pool.query( INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9), [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, "NURSING", loc.name, tid] ); res.json({ ok: true, locationName: loc.name }); }); // ================= Role-aware TAP entry pages ================= // /tap/u/:token → redirects inside the app based on user role/category app.get("/tap/u/:token", (req, res) => { const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim(); Open the Ernos app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; } var c=decodeJwt(JWT); var role=String(c.role||'').toUpperCase(); var cat =String(c.category||'').toUpperCase(); var target = (role==='ADMIN'||cat==='AUDITOR') ? '/tap/env/'+TOKEN : (cat==='NURSING' ? const api = PUBLIC_API_URL || ""; res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <body style="font-family:system-ui;max-width:640px;margin:24px auto;padding:0 12px;background:#0c1e3d;color:#f0f4fb"> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px"> <img src="/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" style="display:none;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;background:#0b2146;color:#b8c5e6;border:1px solid #2f4f8a"></div> <div id="issueBox" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #173060;border-radius:10px;background:#0f274f"> <div style="margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700">Report maintenance issue</div> <textarea id="issueText" placeholder="Describe the problem…" style="width:100%;min-height:84px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #35405a;background:#2a3040;color:#f0f4fb;padding:8px"></textarea> <div style="margin-top:8px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end"> <button id="btnSendIssue" style="padding:8px 12px;border-radius:10px;border:0;background:#2e8af6;color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer">Send</button> </div> </div> <script> (function(){ function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; } function setMsg(t,k){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); show(el); el.textContent=t; el.style.background=(k==='ok'?'#103622':'#0b2146'); if(k==='error'){el.style.background='#3d1717'} el.style.color=(k==='ok'?'#ffffff':k==='error'?'#ffd6d6':'#b8c5e6'); el.style.borderColor=(k==='ok'?'#215f41':k==='error'?'#6e3030':'#2f4f8a'); } var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} try{ var APP_URL = "/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(APP_URL); }); }catch(_){} if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in, then tap again.','error'); return; } setMsg('Contacting server…','muted'); fetch((API||'') + '/tap/ci/perform',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=>{ var role=String(j.role||'').toUpperCase(); var text = j.action==='checkin' ? (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning started in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit started in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance started in ':'Checked in at ') : (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning finished in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit finished in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance finished in ':'Checked out from '); var dur = (j.durationMin!=null && j.action==='checkout') ? (' — duration '+j.durationMin+' min') : ''; setMsg('✅ '+text+(j.locationName||'this location')+dur,'ok'); show(document.getElementById('issueBox')); var btn=document.getElementById('btnSendIssue'); if(btn) btn.onclick=function(){ var txt=(document.getElementById('issueText').value||'').trim(); if(!txt){ setMsg('No issue text entered.','ok'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/issues',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,text:txt})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(()=>{ setMsg('Issue sent. Thank you!','ok'); document.getElementById('issueText').value='';}) .catch(e=>setMsg(e.message||String(e),'error')); }; }) .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e),'error')); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // Nursing TAP page (thin wrapper calling /tap/nursing/check) app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", (req, res) => { const token = req.params.token || ""; const api = PUBLIC_API_URL || ""; res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <body style="font-family:system-ui;max-width:640px;margin:24px auto;padding:0 12px;background:#0c1e3d;color:#f0f4fb"> <h3>Nursing Tap</h3> <div id="msg" style="display:none;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;background:#0b2146;color:#dcf;border:1px solid #2f4f8a"></div> <script> (function(){ function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; } function setMsg(t,k){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); show(el); el.textContent=t; el.style.background=(k==='ok'?'#103622':'#0b2146'); if(k==='error'){el.style.background='#3d1717'} el.style.color=(k==='ok'?'#dcfff3':k==='error'?'#ffd6d6':'#dcf'); el.style.borderColor=(k==='ok'?'#215f41':k==='error'?'#6e3030':'#2f4f8a'); } var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} try{ var APP_URL = "/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(APP_URL); }); }catch(_){} if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in as Nursing, then tap again.','error'); return; } setMsg('Logging nursing check…','muted'); fetch((API||'') + '/tap/nursing/check',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> setMsg('✅ Resident checked at '+(j.locationName||'this location')+'.','ok')) .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e),'error')); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // Admin/Auditor TAP page (adds location to the currently-open audit in the browser) app.get("/tap/env/:token", (req, res) => { const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim(); res .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Auditor Tap</title> <body style="font:14px system-ui;padding:24px;max-width:540px;margin:0 auto;background:#0c1e3d;color:#f0f4fb"> <header><img src="/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/icons/icon.svg'"></header> <div id="msg" style="padding:10px;border-radius:10px;background:#0b2146;border:1px solid #2f4f8a;color:#b8c5e6"></div> <script> (function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)}; var API = ""; try{ API=(localStorage.getItem("ernosApi")||location.origin).replace(/\\/+$/,''); }catch(_){} var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""; }catch(_){} try{ var APP_URL = "/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(APP_URL); }); }catch(_){} function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; el.style.display=''; } if(!JWT){ setMsg("You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in (Auditor/Admin), then tap again."); return; } setMsg("Contacting server…"); fetch(API + "/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(me=>{ var role=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(); var cat=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase(); if(!(role==="ADMIN"||cat==="AUDITOR")){ location.replace("/tap/u/"+TOKEN); return; } var audId=parseInt(localStorage.getItem("ernos_current_audit_id")||"0",10); if(!audId){ setMsg("Auditor signed in, but no open audit in this browser. Open the app, click an audit, then tap again."); return; } return fetch(API+"/env/tap",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}, body: JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,auditId:audId})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> setMsg("Location added to audit: "+(j.locationName||"")+".")); }) .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // (Optional) Reception visitor page lives elsewhere – excluded unless you want it too. } module.exports = { registerTapRoutes }; s one!
ChatGPT said:

Thanks — this file makes the picture super clear. Here’s exactly what this previous tap logic does and what Housekeeping sees/does when they scan a tag.

What these routes do (by role)

1) Token creation

POST /qrcodes

  • Creates a token in qrcodes(token, location_id, tenant_id).

  • Returns multiple ready-to-use links:

    • urlTapAuto = /tap/u/:token (role-aware entry)

    • urlTapReception = /tap/reception/:token

    • urlTapEnv = /tap/env/:token (auditor/admin)

    • urlTapCi = /tap/ci/:token (HK/Maint/Nursing “check-in/out” flow)

    • urlTapFridge = /tap/fridge/:token (reserved)

    • urlTapFire = /tap/fire/:token (reserved)

  • If the location type is explicitly RECEPTION/FRIDGE/FIRE, it points urlTap to that specific tap; otherwise urlTap is the auto one.

2) Role-aware entry page

GET /tap/u/:token

  • Minimal HTML that:

    • Pulls ernosToken from localStorage, decodes the JWT on the client, and chooses where to go:

      • Admin OR Auditor → /tap/env/:token

      • Nursing → /tap/nursing/:token

      • Everyone else (e.g., Housekeeping, Maintenance) → /tap/ci/:token

  • If you’re not signed in (no JWT in localStorage), it tells you to open the Ernos app and sign in first.

This is the key difference from your current code. The old flow chooses by role, not only by location type.

3) Housekeeping / Maintenance flow (your “HK tap”)

GET /tap/ci/:token (page)
→ Immediately calls POST /tap/ci/perform with that token, then shows a status and an optional quick-issue box.

POST /tap/ci/perform

  • Resolves the token → finds location and the current user (via JWT).

  • Toggle behavior:

    • If the same user already has an open checkins row for that location (i.e., checkout_at IS NULL), it closes it (sets checkout_at) and returns the duration.

    • Otherwise it creates a new check-in row with:

      • user_id, location_id, checkin_at=now, user_name, user_category (from the user), location_name, tenant_id.

  • The page then:

    • Shows a message like

      • Housekeeping: “Cleaning started in …” or “Cleaning finished in … — duration X min”

      • Maintenance: “Maintenance started/finished … ”

      • Nursing / other: “Visit/Checked in/out …”

    • Displays “Report maintenance issue” panel:

      • Textarea + Send button → POST /issues with { token, text }.

TL;DR for Housekeeping (what they see after scanning)

  1. They hit the role-aware /tap/u/:token.

  2. Because they’re not Admin/Auditor/Nursing, they’re sent to /tap/ci/:token.

  3. That page calls /tap/ci/perform:

    • If they weren’t checked in at that room yet → “Cleaning started in {Room}”.

    • If they were still checked in → “Cleaning finished in {Room} — duration N min”.

  4. They can file a maintenance issue right there (textarea → “Send”).

That is the entire HK experience in the previous server: toggle check-in/out + quick issue.

4) Nursing flow

GET /tap/nursing/:token (page)
→ Calls POST /tap/nursing/check (one-shot) and shows “✅ Resident checked at {location}.”

POST /tap/nursing/check

  • Creates a row in checkins with user_category = 'NURSING' (no toggle, no checkout).

5) Auditor/Admin flow

GET /tap/env/:token (page)

  • Verifies you’re Admin or Auditor.

  • Reads localStorage.ernos_current_audit_id.

  • If an audit is active in this browser, it POSTs /env/tap with { token, auditId } to add the location to the current audit; otherwise it tells you to open an audit in the app first.

6) Token normalization

normalizeToken() is permissive:

  • Strips prefixes like ci/, reception/, env/

  • Supports tokens coming from #..., .../path/..., or full URLs

  • So all of these resolve to the same token.

Why your current HK tap “doesn’t work”

In your current code (from plugins/fridge_fire.cjs):

  • The auto‐resolver /tap/u/:token doesn’t exist.
    Instead, your current resolver redirects by location type only:

    • FRIDGE → /tap/fridge/:token

    • FIRE → /tap/fire/:token

    • ROOM/ASSET → /tap/visit/:token ❌ but there is no such route now, so HK gets a 404.

  • That’s why Housekeeping in a ROOM “doesn’t work at all” today.

The old system always sent HK/Maint to /tap/ci/:token, which both checked them in/out and let them raise a maintenance issue.

Bottom line (what HK should see/do)

  • Scan room/asset tag → role-aware entry → /tap/ci/:token

  • Page immediately performs the toggle:

    • First tap → “Cleaning started in {Room}”

    • Next tap (same person & same room) → “Cleaning finished — duration X min”

  • They can send a maintenance issue from the same page.

If you want today’s app to behave like this again, bring back the role-aware /tap/u/:token routing and the /tap/ci endpoints, or at least redirect ROOM/ASSET to the existing Reception tap or to /tap/ci if you re-add it.

You said:
no leave reception as it is please in the name of God....yes I want all of my tap/tokens to go back as they were, firges and fire are not there, so leave them as they are in the newer script, so this laste pasted script was from previous script if you know what I mean before all this bullshit ansd I would like that tap for housekeeping has back tthe features it had only in the new "skin color" as itis in the main page and reception that way not blue one it had,, then I want all the functions on admin/auditor as it was, the samei for maintance, nursing so make changes in scripts with these what I ma asking you , oh....what Imean get the features back I had change the visuals for them and leave alone reception, fridges and fire OK?? clear enough, you have all servers there so you will know where to look for it.
ChatGPT said:

Got it. We’ll leave Reception + Fridge + Fire exactly as they are now, and bring back the old role-aware TAP (HK/Maint/Nursing/Admin/Auditor) behavior and pages — but with your new light skin (not the old blue). Below are precise edits (file, spot, and code to paste).

1) Fix the auto “TAP” routing + restore HK/Nursing/Auditor pages

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs

1A) Create the checkins table (needed for HK/Maint toggle)

Find the function async function migrate(){ and its big SQL string (const sql = \``) that currently creates fridge_logsandfire_checks`.

Add this block at the END of that SQL string (still inside the backticks, before the closing ```):

sql
    -- Housekeeping / Maintenance / Nursing check-ins (toggle)
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS checkins (
      id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
      location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
      checkin_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
      checkout_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      note TEXT,
      user_name TEXT,
      user_category TEXT,
      location_name TEXT,
      tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id)
    );
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_user_open ON checkins(user_id, location_id) WHERE checkout_at IS NULL;
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_tenant ON checkins(tenant_id);

No other change to the migration block — just append that SQL.

1B) Replace the current /tap/u/:token route with a role-aware entry page

Find this exact block in the same file:

js
// --- Auto tap resolver: /tap/u/:token → redirect to the right tap page
app.get("/tap/u/:token", async (req, res) => {
  try{
    const token = normalizeToken(req.params.token || "");
    if (!token) return res.status(400).send("Bad token");

    const { rows } = await pool.query(
      `SELECT l.type
         FROM qrcodes q
         JOIN locations l ON l.id = q.location_id
        WHERE q.token = $1
        LIMIT 1`,
      [token]
    );
    if (!rows.length) return res.status(404).send("Unknown token");

    const t = String(rows[0].type || "").toUpperCase();

    // Redirect based on location type
    if (t === "FRIDGE")      return res.redirect(302, `/tap/fridge/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
    if (t === "FIRE")        return res.redirect(302, `/tap/fire/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
    if (t === "RECEPTION")   return res.redirect(302, `/tap/reception/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
    if (t === "ROOM" || t === "ASSET") {
      // If you have a visitors tap page:
      return res.redirect(302, `/tap/visit/${encodeURIComponent(token)}`);
    }

    // Fallback: send them to app (so they can still action it manually)
    return res.redirect(302, `/app.html#dashboard`);
  }catch(e){
    console.error("[tap/u] error", e);
    res.status(500).send("Server error");
  }
});

REPLACE the entire block above with this role-aware HTML page (light theme):

js
// --- Role-aware TAP entry: /tap/u/:token
app.get("/tap/u/:token", (req, res) => {
  const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
  const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
  res
    .status(200)
    .type("html")
    .send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Tap</title>
<style>
  :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; }
  body{font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);padding:24px}
  .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)}
  #msg{margin:10px 0;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--panel);color:var(--muted)}
</style>
<body>
  <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px">
    <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'">
  </header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Processing…</div>
<script>
(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}; if(!API) API = location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){}
  try{
    var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
    history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}
  function decodeJwt(t){ try{ var p=t.split('.')[1]||''; while(p.length%4)p+='='; return JSON.parse(atob(p)); }catch(_){ return {}; } }
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; }
  var c=decodeJwt(JWT);
  var role=String(c.role||'').toUpperCase();
  var cat =String(c.category||'').toUpperCase();

  // If user is Admin/Auditor → env, Nursing → nursing, else → housekeeping/maintenance toggle (/tap/ci)
  var target = (role==='ADMIN' || cat==='AUDITOR') ? '/tap/env/' + TOKEN
            : (cat==='NURSING') ? '/tap/nursing/' + TOKEN
            : '/tap/ci/' + TOKEN;

  // NOTE: We keep existing fridge/fire dedicated pages unchanged.
  location.replace(target);
})();
</script></body></html>`);
});

That restores the old role-based routing (HK/Maint → /tap/ci, Nursing → /tap/nursing, Admin/Auditor → /tap/env) and doesn’t touch Reception/Fridge/Fire.

1C) Add the HK/Maint page and the perform API (light skin)

ADD the following code block below the /tap/u/:token route you just replaced (still in plugins/fridge_fire.cjs):

js
// --- Housekeeping / Maintenance TAP page (light theme)
app.get("/tap/ci/:token", (req, res) => {
  const token = req.params.token || "";
  const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
  res
    .status(200)
    .type("html")
    .send(`<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Ernos • Housekeeping</title>
<style>
  :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; }
  body{font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:24px auto;padding:0 12px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)}
  .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)}
  .row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end}
  textarea{width:100%;min-height:84px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:var(--text);padding:8px}
  button{padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:0;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}
  #msg{margin:10px 0}
</style>
<body>
  <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px">
    <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'">
  </header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div>
  <div id="issueBox" class="card" style="display:none;margin-top:10px">
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700">Report maintenance issue</div>
    <textarea id="issueText" placeholder="Describe the problem…"></textarea>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px">
      <button id="btnSendIssue">Send</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>
(function(){
  function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; }
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){}
  try{
    var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
    history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}
  if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; }

  fetch((API||'') + '/tap/ci/perform',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
    body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})
  })
  .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
  .then(j=>{
    var role=String(j.role||'').toUpperCase();
    var text = j.action==='checkin'
      ? (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning started in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit started in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance started in ':'Checked in at ')
      : (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning finished in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit finished in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance finished in ':'Checked out from ');
    var dur = (j.durationMin!=null && j.action==='checkout') ? (' — duration '+j.durationMin+' min') : '';
    setMsg('✅ '+text+(j.locationName||'this location')+dur);
    show(document.getElementById('issueBox'));
    var btn=document.getElementById('btnSendIssue');
    if(btn) btn.onclick=function(){
      var txt=(document.getElementById('issueText').value||'').trim();
      if(!txt){ setMsg('No issue text entered.'); return; }
      fetch((API||'') + '/issues',{
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
        body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,text:txt})
      })
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(()=>{ setMsg('Issue sent. Thank you!'); document.getElementById('issueText').value='';})
      .catch(e=>setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
    };
  })
  .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)));
})();
</script></body></html>`);
});

// --- HK/Maint toggle perform API
app.post("/tap/ci/perform", auth, async (req, res) => {
  try{
    const { token } = req.body || {};
    const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
    const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]);
    if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });
    const qr = qrRows[0];

    const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]);
    if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
    const loc = locRows[0];

    const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0);
    const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]);
    if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" });
    const u = userRows[0];

    // Toggle: if user has an open checkin at this location -> checkout
    const { rows: openRows } = await pool.query(
      `SELECT * FROM checkins
       WHERE user_id=$1 AND location_id=$2 AND checkout_at IS NULL
       ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1`, [u.id, loc.id]
    );

    if (openRows.length) {
      const open = openRows[0];
      const end = nowISO();
      await pool.query("UPDATE checkins SET checkout_at=$1 WHERE id=$2", [end, open.id]);
      const { rows: d } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(checkout_at, NOW()) - checkin_at))/60 AS minutes
         FROM checkins WHERE id=$1`, [open.id]
      );
      const durationMin = d[0]?.minutes != null ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(d[0].minutes))) : null;
      return res.json({
        ok: true,
        action: "checkout",
        role: u.category || "",
        locationName: loc.name,
        started_at: open.checkin_at,
        ended_at: end,
        durationMin,
      });
    }

    // else: check in
    const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
    const started = nowISO();
    const ins = await pool.query(
      `INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id)
       VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9) RETURNING id`,
      [u.id, loc.id, started, null, "", u.name, String(u.category||""), loc.name, tid]
    );
    return res.json({
      ok: true,
      action: "checkin",
      role: u.category || "",
      locationName: loc.name,
      checkinId: ins.rows[0].id,
      started_at: started,
    });
  }catch(e){
    console.error("[tap/ci/perform]", e);
    res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
  }
});

1D) Add Nursing page + API (light skin)

ADD this block below the code you just added:

js
// --- Nursing TAP page (light theme)
app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", (req, res) => {
  const token = req.params.token || "";
  const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
  res
    .status(200)
    .type("html")
    .send(`<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Ernos • Nursing</title>
<style>
  :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; }
  body{font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:24px auto;padding:0 12px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)}
  .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)}
</style>
<body>
  <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px">
    <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'">
  </header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Logging nursing check…</div>
<script>
(function(){
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){}
  try{
    var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
    history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}
  if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in as Nursing, then tap again.'); return; }
  fetch((API||'') + '/tap/nursing/check',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
    body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})
  })
  .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
  .then(j=> setMsg('✅ Resident checked at '+(j.locationName||'this location')+'.'))
  .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)));
})();
</script></body></html>`);
});

// --- Nursing check API (one-shot)
app.post("/tap/nursing/check", auth, async (req, res) => {
  try{
    const { token } = req.body || {};
    const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
    const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]);
    if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

    const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qrRows[0].location_id]);
    if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
    const loc = locRows[0];

    const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0);
    const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]);
    if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" });
    const u = userRows[0];

    const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
    await pool.query(
      `INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id)
       VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9)`,
      [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, "NURSING", loc.name, tid]
    );
    res.json({ ok: true, locationName: loc.name });
  }catch(e){
    console.error("[tap/nursing/check]", e);
    res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
  }
});

1E) Add Auditor/Admin “env” page (light skin)

(Calls your existing /env/tap server endpoint.)

ADD this block below the Nursing code:

js
// --- Admin/Auditor TAP page (light theme)
app.get("/tap/env/:token", (req, res) => {
  const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
  res
    .type("html")
    .send(`<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>Ernos • Auditor Tap</title>
<style>
  :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; }
  body{font:14px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;padding:24px;max-width:540px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)}
  .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)}
</style>
<body>
  <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px">
    <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'">
  </header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div>
<script>
(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)};
  var API = ""; try{ API=(localStorage.getItem("ernosApi")||location.origin).replace(/\\/+$/,''); }catch(_){}
  var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""; }catch(_){}
  try{
    var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
    history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  if(!JWT){ setMsg("You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in (Auditor/Admin), then tap again."); return; }
  setMsg("Checking permissions…");
  fetch(API + "/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}})
   .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
   .then(me=>{
      var role=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(); var cat=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase();
      if(!(role==="ADMIN"||cat==="AUDITOR")){ location.replace("/tap/u/"+TOKEN); return; }
      var audId=parseInt(localStorage.getItem("ernos_current_audit_id")||"0",10);
      if(!audId){ setMsg("Auditor signed in, but no open audit in this browser. Open the app, click an audit, then tap again."); return; }
      return fetch(API+"/env/tap",{
        method:"POST",
        headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},
        body: JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,auditId:audId})
      })
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(j=> setMsg("Location added to audit: "+(j.locationName||"")+".")); 
   })
   .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
})();
</script></body></html>`);
});

We did not touch your Reception page, nor the existing Fridge/Fire pages and endpoints — they remain as you currently have them.

2) What Housekeeping sees now (after this fix)

  • They scan/tag → /tap/u/:token (role-aware) sends them to /tap/ci/:token.

  • The page immediately toggles at that room:

    • First tap → “Cleaning started in {Room}”.

    • Second tap (same user + room) → “Cleaning finished in {Room} — duration X min”.

  • On that page they can submit a maintenance issue (textarea → POST /issues).

  • All on your light theme (matching the app), Reception unchanged.

3) Password + “stay signed in” (your question)

Password hashing / change:

  • In backend/plugins/staff.cjs you’re using bcrypt and updating both password and password_hash columns. That’s fine.

  • /me/password correctly compares old password then sets a new hash.

  • must_change_password is used properly (admins resets set it TRUE; user self-change sets FALSE). ✅

“Keep me signed in”:

  • The frontend always saves the JWT to localStorage (that’s why users stay logged in across refresh).

  • The checkbox (“Keep me signed in”) currently only:

    • Sends a remember flag to /auth/login and

    • Stores ernosRemember in localStorage — it doesn’t change token storage client-side.

  • Whether the login lasts longer depends on your server’s /auth/login: it must issue a longer-expiry JWT if remember: true. Your code for /auth/login isn’t in the snippets you sent, so I can’t edit it here — but the frontend side is fine.

Bottom line: users stay signed in as long as the JWT is valid and not cleared. To make “Keep me signed in” extend duration, do it server-side in /auth/login (issue a longer exp when remember is true).

Quick test checklist (after you paste the code above)

  1. Restart server.

  2. Generate a QR for a ROOM/ASSET location (Reception left as is).

  3. Scan:

    • HK/Maint → see “Cleaning started…” then “finished … duration …” on second tap; can send issue.

    • Nursing → “✅ Resident checked …”.

    • Admin/Auditor → adds location to the active audit (make one active in the app first).

  4. Fridge/Fire/Reception: unchanged (keep using your current pages and logic).

If anything is unclear, tell me which file/line and I’ll pinpoint further — but the blocks above are copy-paste ready with exact locations.

You said:
// plugins/fridge_fire.cjs module.exports = function setupFridgeFire(opts){ const { app, pool, auth, PUBLIC_API_URL = "", // Optional helpers from your server; we polyfill if missing: nowISO = () => new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d{3}Z$/, "Z"), tenantIdOf = (req) => Number(req.user?.tenant_id || 0), roleOf = (req) => String(req.user?.role||"").toUpperCase(), catOf = (req) => String(req.user?.category||"").toUpperCase(), } = opts || {}; if (!app || !pool || !auth) { throw new Error("[fridge_fire] Missing required { app, pool, auth }"); } /* ---------- Migrations (idempotent) ---------- */ async function migrate(){ const sql = -- Fridge temperature logs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fridge_logs ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, taken_at TIMESTAMPTZ, temp_c NUMERIC, staff_role TEXT, tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fridge_loc_time ON fridge_logs(location_id, taken_at DESC); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fridge_tenant ON fridge_logs(tenant_id); -- Housekeeping / Maintenance / Nursing check-ins (toggle) CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS checkins ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, checkin_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, checkout_at TIMESTAMPTZ, note TEXT, user_name TEXT, user_category TEXT, location_name TEXT, tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_user_open ON checkins(user_id, location_id) WHERE checkout_at IS NULL; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_tenant ON checkins(tenant_id); -- Fire safety checks CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fire_checks ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, check_at TIMESTAMPTZ, kind TEXT, -- PANEL | EXTINGUISHER | DRILL staff_role TEXT, note TEXT, tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fire_loc_time ON fire_checks(location_id, check_at DESC); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fire_tenant ON fire_checks(tenant_id); ; await pool.query(sql); } migrate().catch(e => console.error("[fridge_fire migrate]", e)); /* ---------- Small helper ---------- */ function normalizeToken(raw){ let t = String(raw || "").trim(); try { t = decodeURIComponent(t); } catch {} if (t.startsWith("#")) t = t.slice(1); if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(t)) { const parts = t.split("#"); t = parts[1] || t.split("/").pop(); } if (t.includes("/")) t = t.split("/").pop(); return t; } /* ---------- Minimal self /me just for role/category checks ---------- */ app.get("/ff/me", auth, (req, res) => { res.json({ role: req.user?.role || "", category: req.user?.category || "" }); }); /* ---------- Fridge: tap page ---------- */ app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", (req, res) => { const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim(); const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,""); res.status(200).type("html").send(<!doctype html> <html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Fridge Temp</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#0c1e3d; --panel:#0f274f; --text:#f0f4fb; --muted:#b8c5e6; --brand:#2e8af6; } body{font:15px system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);padding:24px} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid #173060;border-radius:16px;padding:16px} input,button{font:inherit} input{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #35405a;background:#2a3040;color:#f0f4fb} button{padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:0;background:#2e8af6;color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer} #msg{margin:10px 0;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #2f4f8a;background:#0b2146;color:#b8c5e6;display:none} .ok{border-color:#215f41;background:#103622;color:#eafff4} .err{border-color:#6e3030;background:#3d1717;color:#ffd6d6} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <h2 style="margin:0">Fridge temperature</h2> </header> <div id="msg"></div> <div class="card"> <label class="muted">Enter temperature (°C)</label> <input id="t" type="number" step="0.1" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="e.g. 5.0"> <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px"> <button id="save">Save</button> </div> </div> <script>(function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} function msg(t,cls){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; el.className=cls||''; el.style.display=t?'':'none'; } if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){} location.replace("/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"); return; } // Role/category check: only NURSING (or Admins) may proceed fetch((API||'')+"/ff/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(me=>{ var r=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(), c=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase(); if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING")){ msg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing.", "err"); return; } document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){ var v = parseFloat(document.getElementById('t').value); if(!isFinite(v)){ msg("Enter a valid number","err"); return; } fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fridge/log",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,temp_c:v})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> msg("Saved " + v.toFixed(1) + "°C at " + (j.locationName||'fridge') + ".","ok")) .catch(e=> msg(e.message||String(e),"err")); }; }) .catch(e=> msg(e.message||String(e),"err")); })();</script></body></html>); }); /* ---------- Fire: tap page ---------- */ app.get("/tap/fire/:token", (req, res) => { const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim(); const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,""); res.status(200).type("html").send(<!doctype html> <html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Fire Check</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#0c1e3d; --panel:#0f274f; --text:#f0f4fb; --muted:#b8c5e6; --brand:#2e8af6; } body{font:15px system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);padding:24px} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid #173060;border-radius:16px;padding:16px} textarea,button,select{font:inherit} select,textarea{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #35405a;background:#2a3040;color:#f0f4fb} textarea{min-height:88px} button{padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:0;background:#2e8af6;color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer} #msg{margin:10px 0;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #2f4f8a;background:#0b2146;color:#b8c5e6;display:none} .ok{border-color:#215f41;background:#103622;color:#eafff4} .err{border-color:#6e3030;background:#3d1717;color:#ffd6d6} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <h2 style="margin:0">Fire safety</h2> </header> <div id="msg"></div> <div class="card"> <label class="muted">What did you check?</label> <select id="kind"> <option value="PANEL">Fire panel</option> <option value="EXTINGUISHER">Extinguisher</option> <option value="DRILL">Emergency drill completed</option> </select> <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Note (optional)</label> <textarea id="note" placeholder="e.g. Weekly panel check OK"></textarea> <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px"> <button id="save">Save</button> </div> </div> <script>(function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} function msg(t,cls){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; el.className=cls||''; el.style.display=t?'':'none'; } if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){} location.replace("/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"); return; } document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){ var kind = String(document.getElementById('kind').value||'PANEL'); var note = String(document.getElementById('note').value||''); fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fire/check",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,kind:kind,note:note})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> msg("Saved " + kind + " at " + (j.locationName||'fire location') + ".","ok")) .catch(e=> msg(e.message||String(e),"err")); }; })();</script></body></html>); }); // --- Role-aware TAP entry: /tap/u/:token app.get("/tap/u/:token", (req, res) => { const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim(); const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || ""); res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html> <html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover"> <title>Ernos • Tap</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; } body{font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);padding:24px} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)} #msg{margin:10px 0;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--panel);color:var(--muted)} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Processing…</div> <script> (function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)}; var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}; if(!API) API = location.origin; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} function decodeJwt(t){ try{ var p=t.split('.')[1]||''; while(p.length%4)p+='='; return JSON.parse(atob(p)); }catch(_){ return {}; } } function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; } var c=decodeJwt(JWT); var role=String(c.role||'').toUpperCase(); var cat =String(c.category||'').toUpperCase(); // If user is Admin/Auditor → env, Nursing → nursing, else → housekeeping/maintenance toggle (/tap/ci) var target = (role==='ADMIN' || cat==='AUDITOR') ? '/tap/env/' + TOKEN : (cat==='NURSING') ? '/tap/nursing/' + TOKEN : '/tap/ci/' + TOKEN; // NOTE: We keep existing fridge/fire dedicated pages unchanged. location.replace(target); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Housekeeping / Maintenance TAP page (light theme) app.get("/tap/ci/:token", (req, res) => { const token = req.params.token || ""; const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || ""); res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Housekeeping</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; } body{font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:24px auto;padding:0 12px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)} .row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end} textarea{width:100%;min-height:84px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:var(--text);padding:8px} button{padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:0;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer} #msg{margin:10px 0} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div> <div id="issueBox" class="card" style="display:none;margin-top:10px"> <div style="margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700">Report maintenance issue</div> <textarea id="issueText" placeholder="Describe the problem…"></textarea> <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px"> <button id="btnSendIssue">Send</button> </div> </div> <script> (function(){ function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; } function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/tap/ci/perform',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT}, body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=>{ var role=String(j.role||'').toUpperCase(); var text = j.action==='checkin' ? (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning started in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit started in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance started in ':'Checked in at ') : (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning finished in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit finished in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance finished in ':'Checked out from '); var dur = (j.durationMin!=null && j.action==='checkout') ? (' — duration '+j.durationMin+' min') : ''; setMsg('✅ '+text+(j.locationName||'this location')+dur); show(document.getElementById('issueBox')); var btn=document.getElementById('btnSendIssue'); if(btn) btn.onclick=function(){ var txt=(document.getElementById('issueText').value||'').trim(); if(!txt){ setMsg('No issue text entered.'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/issues',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT}, body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,text:txt}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(()=>{ setMsg('Issue sent. Thank you!'); document.getElementById('issueText').value='';}) .catch(e=>setMsg(e.message||String(e))); }; }) .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Nursing TAP page (light theme) app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", (req, res) => { const token = req.params.token || ""; const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || ""); res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Nursing</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; } body{font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:24px auto;padding:0 12px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Logging nursing check…</div> <script> (function(){ function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in as Nursing, then tap again.'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/tap/nursing/check',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT}, body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> setMsg('✅ Resident checked at '+(j.locationName||'this location')+'.')) .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Admin/Auditor TAP page (light theme) app.get("/tap/env/:token", (req, res) => { const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim(); res .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Auditor Tap</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#F4F5F7; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#2E2E2E; --muted:#606060; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#E1E3E8; } body{font:14px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;padding:24px;max-width:540px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06)} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div> <script> (function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)}; var API = ""; try{ API=(localStorage.getItem("ernosApi")||location.origin).replace(/\\/+$/,''); }catch(_){} var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""; }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } if(!JWT){ setMsg("You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in (Auditor/Admin), then tap again."); return; } setMsg("Checking permissions…"); fetch(API + "/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(me=>{ var role=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(); var cat=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase(); if(!(role==="ADMIN"||cat==="AUDITOR")){ location.replace("/tap/u/"+TOKEN); return; } var audId=parseInt(localStorage.getItem("ernos_current_audit_id")||"0",10); if(!audId){ setMsg("Auditor signed in, but no open audit in this browser.
