Open the app, click an audit, then tap again."); return; } return fetch(API+"/env/tap",{ method:"POST", headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}, body: JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,auditId:audId}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> setMsg("Location added to audit: "+(j.locationName||"")+".")); }) .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Nursing check API (one-shot) app.post("/tap/nursing/check", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qrRows[0].location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0); const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]); if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" }); const u = userRows[0]; const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); await pool.query( INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9), [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, "NURSING", loc.name, tid] ); res.json({ ok: true, locationName: loc.name }); }catch(e){ console.error("[tap/nursing/check]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); // --- HK/Maint toggle perform API app.post("/tap/ci/perform", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const qr = qrRows[0]; const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0); const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]); if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" }); const u = userRows[0]; // Toggle: if user has an open checkin at this location -> checkout const { rows: openRows } = await pool.query( SELECT * FROM checkins WHERE user_id=$1 AND location_id=$2 AND checkout_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1, [u.id, loc.id] ); if (openRows.length) { const open = openRows[0]; const end = nowISO(); await pool.query("UPDATE checkins SET checkout_at=$1 WHERE id=$2", [end, open.id]); const { rows: d } = await pool.query( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(checkout_at, NOW()) - checkin_at))/60 AS minutes FROM checkins WHERE id=$1, [open.id] ); const durationMin = d[0]?.minutes != null ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(d[0].minutes))) : null; return res.json({ ok: true, action: "checkout", role: u.category || "", locationName: loc.name, started_at: open.checkin_at, ended_at: end, durationMin, }); } // else: check in const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const started = nowISO(); const ins = await pool.query( INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9) RETURNING id, [u.id, loc.id, started, null, "", u.name, String(u.category||""), loc.name, tid] ); return res.json({ ok: true, action: "checkin", role: u.category || "", locationName: loc.name, checkinId: ins.rows[0].id, started_at: started, }); }catch(e){ console.error("[tap/ci/perform]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); /* ---------- Fridge API ---------- */ app.post("/ff/fridge/log", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token, temp_c } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const t = Number(temp_c); if (!norm || !Number.isFinite(t)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "token and temp_c required" }); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FRIDGE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FRIDGE tag" }); const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase(); // Access: only NURSING (or Admins) can write const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req); if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) { return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" }); } await pool.query( "INSERT INTO fridge_logs(location_id,taken_at,temp_c,staff_role,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5)", [loc.id, nowISO(), t, role, tid] ); res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, temp_c: t }); }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fridge/log]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); app.get("/ff/fridge/logs", auth, async (req, res) => { // View: NURSING or Admin only const r = roleOf(req); const c = catOf(req); if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) { return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" }); } const tid = tenantIdOf(req); const { rows } = await pool.query( SELECT fl.id, fl.location_id, COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fl.location_id) AS location_name, fl.taken_at, fl.temp_c, fl.staff_role FROM fridge_logs fl LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fl.location_id WHERE fl.tenant_id = $1 ORDER BY fl.taken_at DESC LIMIT 1000, [tid] ); res.json({ items: rows }); }); /* ---------- Fire API ---------- */ app.post("/ff/fire/check", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token, kind, note } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const K = String(kind||"PANEL").toUpperCase(); if (!["PANEL","EXTINGUISHER","DRILL"].includes(K)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "bad kind" }); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FIRE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FIRE tag" }); const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase(); await pool.query( "INSERT INTO fire_checks(location_id,check_at,kind,staff_role,note,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6)", [loc.id, nowISO(), K, role, String(note||"").trim(), tid] ); res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, kind: K }); }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fire/check]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); app.get("/ff/fire/logs", auth, async (req, res) => { // View: Admin only const r = roleOf(req); if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL")) { return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" }); } const tid = tenantIdOf(req); const { rows } = await pool.query( SELECT fc.id, fc.location_id, COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fc.location_id) AS location_name, fc.check_at, fc.kind, fc.staff_role, fc.note FROM fire_checks fc LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fc.location_id WHERE fc.tenant_id = $1 ORDER BY fc.check_at DESC LIMIT 1000, [tid] ); res.json({ items: rows }); }); /* ---------- Alerts (separate endpoint, no conflict) ---------- */ app.get("/ff/alerts", auth, async (req, res) => { const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req); const tid = tenantIdOf(req); // Defaults const fridgeCfg = { min_c: 2, max_c: 8, due_hours: 24 }; const fireCfg = { panel_days: 7, extinguisher_days: 30, drill_days: 90 }; // Fridge alerts (only for Nursing/Admin) let fridge_due = [], fridge_out_of_range = []; if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING") { const { rows: fridges } = await pool.query( SELECT l.id, l.name, (SELECT temp_c FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_temp, (SELECT taken_at FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_at FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FRIDGE', [tid] ); const minutesSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now()-t)/60000)); }; for (const x of fridges){ if (!x.last_at || minutesSince(x.last_at) > fridgeCfg.due_hours*60){ fridge_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null }); } if (x.last_temp != null){ const t = Number(x.last_temp); if (t < fridgeCfg.min_c || t > fridgeCfg.max_c){ fridge_out_of_range.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null, last_temp_c: t, range:[fridgeCfg.min_c,fridgeCfg.max_c] }); } } } } // Fire alerts (Admin only) let fire_due = [], fire_drill_due = { last_at:null, days_since:null, overdue:false }; if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL") { const daysSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now()-t)/86400000)); }; const { rows: fires } = await pool.query( SELECT l.id, l.name, (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='PANEL' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS panel_at, (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='EXTINGUISHER' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS ext_at FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FIRE', [tid] ); for (const x of fires){ const dp = daysSince(x.panel_at), de = daysSince(x.ext_at); if (!x.panel_at || dp > fireCfg.panel_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"PANEL", days_since: dp }); if (!x.ext_at || de > fireCfg.extinguisher_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"EXTINGUISHER", days_since: de }); } const { rows: lastDrill } = await pool.query("SELECT MAX(check_at) AS last FROM fire_checks WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(kind)='DRILL'", [tid]); const last = lastDrill[0]?.last || null; const daysS = (last ? Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - (+new Date(last)))/86400000)) : null); fire_drill_due = { last_at:last, days_since: daysS, overdue: (daysS!=null ? daysS > fireCfg.drill_days : true) }; } res.json({ fridge_due, fridge_out_of_range, fire_due, fire_drill_due }); }); }; is it vcorrect now awhat aprevious API's in the code for those taps
ChatGPT said:

Short answer: yes — this file now has the full, working TAP flow back for HK/Maint/Nursing/Admin/Auditor, with your new light skin, while Reception, Fridge, and Fire are left as-is.

Here’s what’s in your exact file (plugins/fridge_fire.cjs) and why it will work now:

What Housekeeping sees when they tap

  • Their QR/NFC opens /tap/u/:token → role-aware page routes them to /tap/ci/:token.

  • The HK page (light skin) immediately calls POST /tap/ci/perform:

    • If they don’t have an open session at that room: “Cleaning started in {Room}.”

    • If they already had one open (same user, same room): “Cleaning finished in {Room} — duration X min.”

  • The page also shows a small form to report a maintenance issue (sends POST /issues with { token, text }).

Exact endpoints/pages now in this file

Pages (GET):

  • /tap/u/:token – role-aware entry (light theme).
    Admin/Auditor → /tap/env/:token • Nursing → /tap/nursing/:token • everyone else → /tap/ci/:token.

  • /tap/ci/:token – HK/Maint page (light theme) with auto check-in/out + “Report issue”.

  • /tap/nursing/:token – Nursing one-tap page (light theme).

  • `/tap/env/:token

You said:
Ok, only thing islogo is bearly visible can we do somehting about it
ChatGPT said:
You said:
sorry please make the backgound on the tap pages as the same gray color as sidebar and header in the main app please ok? and give me exact location in the script what to change with what
ChatGPT said:

got it — we’ll only change the TAP pages you asked for (role-router, HK/Maint, Nursing, Auditor) to use the same gray as your app header/sidebar (#4E6E81), keep cards white, and fix contrast (so the logo/text isn’t washed out). Reception, Fridge, Fire stay exactly as they are.

Below are precise edits in one file: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs. For each route, replace the <style>...</style> block exactly as shown.

1) /tap/u/:token (role-aware router)

Find inside app.get("/tap/u/:token", …) — the <style> block that currently has --bg:#F4F5F7.

Replace the whole <style>…</style> with:

html
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#4E6E81;            /* match app header/sidebar */
    --panel:#FFFFFF;
    --text:#EAF1F4;          /* light text on gray background */
    --muted:#D7E3E8;
    --accent:#7BA297;
    --border:#3E5967;        /* darker divider */
  }
  body{
    font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
    max-width:640px; margin:0 auto; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text); padding:24px
  }
  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* dark text on white card */
  }
  #msg{ margin:10px 0; padding:12px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid var(--border);
        background:var(--panel); color:#606060 }
</style>

2) /tap/ci/:token (Housekeeping / Maintenance)

Find inside app.get("/tap/ci/:token", …) — the <style> block that currently has --bg:#F4F5F7.

Replace the whole <style>…</style> with:

html
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967;
  }
  body{
    font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
    max-width:640px; margin:24px auto; padding:0 12px; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text)
  }
  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* ensure readable on white */
  }
  .row{ display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end }
  textarea{
    width:100%; min-height:84px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid var(--border);
    background:#fff; color:#2E2E2E; padding:8px;               /* fix contrast inside white field */
  }
  button{
    padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; border:0; background:var(--accent); color:#fff;
    font-weight:700; cursor:pointer
  }
  #msg{ margin:10px 0 }
</style>

3) /tap/nursing/:token (Nursing)

Find inside app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", …) — the <style> block that currently has --bg:#F4F5F7.

Replace the whole <style>…</style> with:

html
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967;
  }
  body{
    font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
    max-width:640px; margin:24px auto; padding:0 12px; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text)
  }
  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* dark text on white */
  }
</style>

4) /tap/env/:token (Admin/Auditor)

Find inside app.get("/tap/env/:token", …) — the <style> block that currently has --bg:#F4F5F7.

Replace the whole <style>…</style> with:

html
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967;
  }
  body{
    font:14px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
    padding:24px; max-width:540px; margin:0 auto; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text)
  }
  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* readable on white */
  }
</style>

Why this fixes the “logo barely visible”

  • The page background now matches the app’s header/sidebar gray (#4E6E81) for consistent branding and stronger contrast behind the logo.

  • We keep content in white cards with dark text for readability.

  • Inputs/textarea explicitly use dark text on white to avoid low contrast.

Nothing else is changed: Reception, Fridge, Fire remain untouched.

You said:
great, Now lets solve this issues with keeping logged in users, it still keeps not doing it like, also, I aasked you and asking you to make it possible that when I press back button onmy android or any other smartphone taht it does not thorw out from the page I am giving you an example If I am logged in as housekeeping staff and i TAPO AND IT BRING SEME TO THE PAGE WHERE SIT SAYS CLENING STARTED REPORT MAINTANCE ISSUE AND THEN i PRESS BACK BUTTON IT SHOULD BRING ME BACK TO MAIN PAGE WHERE i AM LOGGED IN AS HOUSEKEEPIGN STAFF.. THE SAEM ASHOULD WORK ON ALL ROLES LIKE, ALSO WHEN WE ARE AT IT WHEN i AM LOGING IN ON MAIN PAGE pc WHEN i HIT ENTER AFTER PUTTING CREDENTILAS IT DOES NOT REACT, SO I NEED TO GO WITH MY CURSOR TO SIGN IN BUTTONE THAT IS BIT OUTDATED...
ChatGPT said:

Absolutely — here’s a precise, surgical set of changes that fixes:

  1. “Keep me signed in” (remember-me)

  2. Android/iOS Back button on TAP pages → returns to the main app, still logged in

  3. “Enter” key submits the sign-in form on desktop

Reception/Fridge/Fire functionality stays as-is. We only touch the SPA and the four TAP pages (role-router, HK/Maint, Nursing, Auditor).

A) SPA (main app) — remember-me + Enter-to-submit + return after TAP login

File: frontend/app.html (the SPA <script> you pasted — same file)

1) Read token from either session or local storage (new)

Find the state object:

js
const state = {
  api: localStorage.getItem("ernosApi") || PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK || location.origin,
  token: localStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || "",
  me: null,
};

Replace with:

js
const state = {
  api: localStorage.getItem("ernosApi") || PUBLIC_API_FALLBACK || location.origin,
  token: (sessionStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || localStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || ""),
  me: null,
};

2) Add remember-me aware setToken

Find the current function setToken(t) { … }
Replace it fully with:

js
function setToken(t, persist = true) {
  state.token = t || "";
  try {
    // Clear both, then set in the chosen store
    sessionStorage.removeItem("ernosToken");
    localStorage.removeItem("ernosToken");
    if (state.token) {
      (persist ? localStorage : sessionStorage).setItem("ernosToken", state.token);
    }
  } catch {}
}

3) Convert the Sign in card to a real <form> (Enter submits) + “Keep me signed in”

Find the whole function viewLogin(){ ... } body.
Replace the ENTIRE function with:

js
function viewLogin(){
  setCrumbs("Sign in");
  $("#view").innerHTML = `
    <div class="card">
      <h2>Sign in</h2>
      <form id="loginForm">
        <div class="grid cols-2" style="margin-top:10px">
          <div>
            <label>API base</label>
            <input id="api" class="input" placeholder="${location.origin}" value="${state.api}"/>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label>Email</label>
            <input id="email" class="input" placeholder="admin@example.com" autocomplete="username" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="grid cols-2" style="margin-top:10px">
          <div>
            <label>Password</label>
            <input id="password" type="password" class="input" placeholder="Password123" autocomplete="current-password" />
            <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:8px">
              <input id="remember" type="checkbox" checked />
              <span>Keep me signed in</span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:flex-end">
            <button id="loginBtn" class="btn" type="submit">Sign in</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  `;
  const form = $("#loginForm");
  form.onsubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    try{
      setApi(val($("#api")));
      const j = await api("/auth/login", {
        method:"POST",
        body: JSON.stringify({ email: val($("#email")), password: val($("#password")) })
      });
      const remember = !!$("#remember")?.checked;
      setToken(j.token, remember);
      await ensureMe();
      renderNav();

      // Force change on first login
      try{
        const m = await api('/me/mcp');
        if (m && m.must_change_password) {
          navTo('#settings');
          showMsg('Please set a new password to continue.', 'warn');
          return;
        }
      }catch(_){}

      // If user came from a TAP page, send them back once after login
      try{
        const ret = localStorage.getItem('ernos_return_to');
        if (ret) { localStorage.removeItem('ernos_return_to'); location.replace(ret); return; }
      }catch(_){}

      navTo("#dashboard");
      showMsg("Signed in.", "ok");
    }catch(e){ showMsg(e.message||String(e), "err"); }
  };
}

Now pressing Enter submits, and checking Keep me signed in persists the token in localStorage. If unchecked, it uses sessionStorage (clears when the browser session ends).

B) TAP pages — Back button returns to main app; read token from session or local storage

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs

We will tweak four TAP routes (leave Reception, Fridge, Fire as-is visually/feature-wise per your request).

For each of the four routes below:

1) /tap/u/:token (role-aware router)

Inside that route’s HTML <script>, make two small edits.

(i) Read JWT from sessionStorage OR localStorage

Find:

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){}

Replace with:

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ''); }catch(_){}

(ii) Stronger back-button trap to the app

Find the block starting with try{ and ending with }catch(_){} that sets history.replaceState / pushState.
Replace that whole block with:

js
try{
  var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
  history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
  addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
}catch(_){}

2) /tap/ci/:token (Housekeeping/Maint)

Inside this route’s HTML <script>, make the same two edits:

(i) JWT storage line

Replace:

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){}

with:

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ''); }catch(_){}

(ii) Back-button trap block

Replace the whole try{ ... }catch(_){} history block with:

js
try{
  var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
  history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
  addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
}catch(_){}

3) /tap/nursing/:token

Make the same two edits in the <script>:

(i) JWT storage line

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ''); }catch(_){}

(ii) Back-button trap block

js
try{
  var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
  history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
  addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
}catch(_){}

4) /tap/env/:token (Admin/Auditor)

Two edits again:

(i) JWT storage line

Find:

js
var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""; }catch(_){}

Replace with:

js
var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || localStorage.getItem("ernosToken") || ""); }catch(_){}

(ii) Back-button trap block

Replace the whole try{ ... }catch(_){} with:

js
try{
  var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
  history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
  addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
}catch(_){}

Optional (only if you want Fridge/Fire to also honor sessionStorage)

If you also want Fridge/Fire taps to work when the user chose not to “Keep me signed in”, change their JWT lines the same way (localStorage → sessionStorage||localStorage). Otherwise leave them untouched as you asked earlier.

What this gives you

  • Stays logged in:

    • If “Keep me signed in” is checked → token stored in localStorage (persists across browser restarts).

    • If unchecked → token stored in sessionStorage (clears on full browser close).

  • Back button UX on phones:
    From any TAP page above, a hardware back press sends users to the main app (/app.html?...) where they stay logged in with their role.

  • Enter key on login:
    Desktop users can press Enter to sign in; no need to click the button.

If you want me to also wire an explicit “Remember me” default to unchecked, say the word and I’ll flip that one attribute for you.

You said:
// plugins/fridge_fire.cjs module.exports = function setupFridgeFire(opts){ const { app, pool, auth, PUBLIC_API_URL = "", // Optional helpers from your server; we polyfill if missing: nowISO = () => new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d{3}Z$/, "Z"), tenantIdOf = (req) => Number(req.user?.tenant_id || 0), roleOf = (req) => String(req.user?.role||"").toUpperCase(), catOf = (req) => String(req.user?.category||"").toUpperCase(), } = opts || {}; if (!app || !pool || !auth) { throw new Error("[fridge_fire] Missing required { app, pool, auth }"); } /* ---------- Migrations (idempotent) ---------- */ async function migrate(){ const sql = -- Fridge temperature logs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fridge_logs ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, taken_at TIMESTAMPTZ, temp_c NUMERIC, staff_role TEXT, tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fridge_loc_time ON fridge_logs(location_id, taken_at DESC); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fridge_tenant ON fridge_logs(tenant_id); -- Housekeeping / Maintenance / Nursing check-ins (toggle) CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS checkins ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, checkin_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, checkout_at TIMESTAMPTZ, note TEXT, user_name TEXT, user_category TEXT, location_name TEXT, tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_user_open ON checkins(user_id, location_id) WHERE checkout_at IS NULL; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_tenant ON checkins(tenant_id); -- Fire safety checks CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fire_checks ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, check_at TIMESTAMPTZ, kind TEXT, -- PANEL | EXTINGUISHER | DRILL staff_role TEXT, note TEXT, tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fire_loc_time ON fire_checks(location_id, check_at DESC); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fire_tenant ON fire_checks(tenant_id); ; await pool.query(sql); } migrate().catch(e => console.error("[fridge_fire migrate]", e)); /* ---------- Small helper ---------- */ function normalizeToken(raw){ let t = String(raw || "").trim(); try { t = decodeURIComponent(t); } catch {} if (t.startsWith("#")) t = t.slice(1); if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(t)) { const parts = t.split("#"); t = parts[1] || t.split("/").pop(); } if (t.includes("/")) t = t.split("/").pop(); return t; } /* ---------- Minimal self /me just for role/category checks ---------- */ app.get("/ff/me", auth, (req, res) => { res.json({ role: req.user?.role || "", category: req.user?.category || "" }); }); /* ---------- Fridge: tap page ---------- */ app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", (req, res) => { const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim(); const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,""); res.status(200).type("html").send(<!doctype html> <html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Fridge Temp</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#0c1e3d; --panel:#0f274f; --text:#f0f4fb; --muted:#b8c5e6; --brand:#2e8af6; } body{font:15px system-ui,sans-serif;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);padding:24px} .card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid #173060;border-radius:16px;padding:16px} input,button{font:inherit} input{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #35405a;background:#2a3040;color:#f0f4fb} button{padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:0;background:#2e8af6;color:#fff;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer} #msg{margin:10px 0;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #2f4f8a;background:#0b2146;color:#b8c5e6;display:none} .ok{border-color:#215f41;background:#103622;color:#eafff4} .err{border-color:#6e3030;background:#3d1717;color:#ffd6d6} </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <h2 style="margin:0">Fridge temperature</h2> </header> <div id="msg"></div> <div class="card"> <label class="muted">Enter temperature (°C)</label> <input id="t" type="number" step="0.1" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="e.g. 5.0"> <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px"> <button id="save">Save</button> </div> </div> <script>(function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} function msg(t,cls){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; el.className=cls||''; el.style.display=t?'':'none'; } if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){} location.replace("/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"); return; } // Role/category check: only NURSING (or Admins) may proceed fetch((API||'')+"/ff/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(me=>{ var r=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(), c=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase(); if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING")){ msg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing.", "err"); return; } document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){ var v = parseFloat(document.getElementById('t').value); if(!isFinite(v)){ msg("Enter a valid number","err"); return; } fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fridge/log",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,temp_c:v})}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> msg("Saved " + v.toFixed(1) + "°C at " + (j.locationName||'fridge') + ".","ok")) .catch(e=> msg(e.message||String(e),"err")); }; }) .catch(e=> msg(e.message||String(e),"err")); })();</script></body></html>); }); /* ---------- Fire: tap page ---------- */ app.get("/tap/fire/:token", (req, res) => { const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim(); const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,""); res.status(200).type("html").send(<!doctype html> <html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Fire Check</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#0c1e3d; color:#2E2E2E; /* dark text on white card */ } #msg{ margin:10px 0; padding:12px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--panel); color:#606060 } </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Processing…</div> <script> (function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)}; var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}; if(!API) API = location.origin; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ''); }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} function decodeJwt(t){ try{ var p=t.split('.')[1]||''; while(p.length%4)p+='='; return JSON.parse(atob(p)); }catch(_){ return {}; } } function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; } var c=decodeJwt(JWT); var role=String(c.role||'').toUpperCase(); var cat =String(c.category||'').toUpperCase(); // If user is Admin/Auditor → env, Nursing → nursing, else → housekeeping/maintenance toggle (/tap/ci) var target = (role==='ADMIN' || cat==='AUDITOR') ? '/tap/env/' + TOKEN : (cat==='NURSING') ? '/tap/nursing/' + TOKEN : '/tap/ci/' + TOKEN; // NOTE: We keep existing fridge/fire dedicated pages unchanged. location.replace(target); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Housekeeping / Maintenance TAP page (light theme) app.get("/tap/ci/:token", (req, res) => { const token = req.params.token || ""; const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || ""); res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Housekeeping</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967; } body{ font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; max-width:640px; margin:24px auto; padding:0 12px; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text) } .card{ background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* ensure readable on white */ } .row{ display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end } textarea{ width:100%; min-height:84px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:#fff; color:#2E2E2E; padding:8px; /* fix contrast inside white field */ } button{ padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; border:0; background:var(--accent); color:#fff; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer } #msg{ margin:10px 0 } </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div> <div id="issueBox" class="card" style="display:none;margin-top:10px"> <div style="margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700">Report maintenance issue</div> <textarea id="issueText" placeholder="Describe the problem…"></textarea> <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px"> <button id="btnSendIssue">Send</button> </div> </div> <script> (function(){ function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; } function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in, then tap again.'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/tap/ci/perform',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT}, body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=>{ var role=String(j.role||'').toUpperCase(); var text = j.action==='checkin' ? (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning started in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit started in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance started in ':'Checked in at ') : (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning finished in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit finished in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance finished in ':'Checked out from '); var dur = (j.durationMin!=null && j.action==='checkout') ? (' — duration '+j.durationMin+' min') : ''; setMsg('✅ '+text+(j.locationName||'this location')+dur); show(document.getElementById('issueBox')); var btn=document.getElementById('btnSendIssue'); if(btn) btn.onclick=function(){ var txt=(document.getElementById('issueText').value||'').trim(); if(!txt){ setMsg('No issue text entered.'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/issues',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT}, body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,text:txt}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(()=>{ setMsg('Issue sent. Thank you!'); document.getElementById('issueText').value='';}) .catch(e=>setMsg(e.message||String(e))); }; }) .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Nursing TAP page (light theme) app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", (req, res) => { const token = req.params.token || ""; const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || ""); res .status(200) .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Nursing</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967; } body{ font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; max-width:640px; margin:24px auto; padding:0 12px; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text) } .card{ background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* dark text on white */ } </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Logging nursing check…</div> <script> (function(){ function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)}; var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} if(!JWT){ setMsg('You are not signed in. Open the app, sign in as Nursing, then tap again.'); return; } fetch((API||'') + '/tap/nursing/check',{ method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT}, body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> setMsg('✅ Resident checked at '+(j.locationName||'this location')+'.')) .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Admin/Auditor TAP page (light theme) app.get("/tap/env/:token", (req, res) => { const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim(); res .type("html") .send(<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"> <title>Ernos • Auditor Tap</title> <style> :root{ --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967; } body{ font:14px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; padding:24px; max-width:540px; margin:0 auto; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text) } .card{ background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E; /* readable on white */ } </style> <body> <header style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px"> <img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" style="height:56px" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"> </header> <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div> <script> (function(){ var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)}; var API = ""; try{ API=(localStorage.getItem("ernosApi")||location.origin).replace(/\\/+$/,''); }catch(_){} var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""; }catch(_){} try{ var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1"; history.replaceState({v:1},""); history.pushState({v:2},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){} function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; } if(!JWT){ setMsg("You are not signed in. Open the Ernos app, sign in (Auditor/Admin), then tap again."); return; } setMsg("Checking permissions…"); fetch(API + "/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}}) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(me=>{ var role=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(); var cat=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase(); if(!(role==="ADMIN"||cat==="AUDITOR")){ location.replace("/tap/u/"+TOKEN); return; } var audId=parseInt(localStorage.getItem("ernos_current_audit_id")||"0",10); if(!audId){ setMsg("Auditor signed in, but no open audit in this browser. Open the app, click an audit, then tap again."); return; } return fetch(API+"/env/tap",{ method:"POST", headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}, body: JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,auditId:audId}) }) .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; })) .then(j=> setMsg("Location added to audit: "+(j.locationName||"")+".")); }) .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e))); })(); </script></body></html>); }); // --- Nursing check API (one-shot) app.post("/tap/nursing/check", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qrRows[0].location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0); const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]); if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" }); const u = userRows[0]; const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); await pool.query( INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9), [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, "NURSING", loc.name, tid] ); res.json({ ok: true, locationName: loc.name }); }catch(e){ console.error("[tap/nursing/check]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); // --- HK/Maint toggle perform API app.post("/tap/ci/perform", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const qr = qrRows[0]; const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0); const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]); if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" }); const u = userRows[0]; // Toggle: if user has an open checkin at this location -> checkout const { rows: openRows } = await pool.query( SELECT * FROM checkins WHERE user_id=$1 AND location_id=$2 AND checkout_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1, [u.id, loc.id] ); if (openRows.length) { const open = openRows[0]; const end = nowISO(); await pool.query("UPDATE checkins SET checkout_at=$1 WHERE id=$2", [end, open.id]); const { rows: d } = await pool.query( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(checkout_at, NOW()) - checkin_at))/60 AS minutes FROM checkins WHERE id=$1, [open.id] ); const durationMin = d[0]?.minutes != null ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(d[0].minutes))) : null; return res.json({ ok: true, action: "checkout", role: u.category || "", locationName: loc.name, started_at: open.checkin_at, ended_at: end, durationMin, }); } // else: check in const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const started = nowISO(); const ins = await pool.query( INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9) RETURNING id, [u.id, loc.id, started, null, "", u.name, String(u.category||""), loc.name, tid] ); return res.json({ ok: true, action: "checkin", role: u.category || "", locationName: loc.name, checkinId: ins.rows[0].id, started_at: started, }); }catch(e){ console.error("[tap/ci/perform]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); /* ---------- Fridge API ---------- */ app.post("/ff/fridge/log", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token, temp_c } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const t = Number(temp_c); if (!norm || !Number.isFinite(t)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "token and temp_c required" }); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FRIDGE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FRIDGE tag" }); const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase(); // Access: only NURSING (or Admins) can write const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req); if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) { return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" }); } await pool.query( "INSERT INTO fridge_logs(location_id,taken_at,temp_c,staff_role,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5)", [loc.id, nowISO(), t, role, tid] ); res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, temp_c: t }); }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fridge/log]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); app.get("/ff/fridge/logs", auth, async (req, res) => { // View: NURSING or Admin only const r = roleOf(req); const c = catOf(req); if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) { return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" }); } const tid = tenantIdOf(req); const { rows } = await pool.query( SELECT fl.id, fl.location_id, COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fl.location_id) AS location_name, fl.taken_at, fl.temp_c, fl.staff_role FROM fridge_logs fl LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fl.location_id WHERE fl.tenant_id = $1 ORDER BY fl.taken_at DESC LIMIT 1000, [tid] ); res.json({ items: rows }); }); /* ---------- Fire API ---------- */ app.post("/ff/fire/check", auth, async (req, res) => { try{ const { token, kind, note } = req.body || {}; const norm = normalizeToken(token || ""); const K = String(kind||"PANEL").toUpperCase(); if (!["PANEL","EXTINGUISHER","DRILL"].includes(K)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "bad kind" }); const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]); if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" }); const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]); if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" }); const loc = locRows[0]; if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FIRE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FIRE tag" }); const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req); const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase(); await pool.query( "INSERT INTO fire_checks(location_id,check_at,kind,staff_role,note,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6)", [loc.id, nowISO(), K, role, String(note||"").trim(), tid] ); res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, kind: K }); }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fire/check]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); } }); app.get("/ff/fire/logs", auth, async (req, res) => { // View: Admin only const r = roleOf(req); if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL")) { return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" }); } const tid = tenantIdOf(req); const { rows } = await pool.query( SELECT fc.id, fc.location_id, COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fc.location_id) AS location_name, fc.check_at, fc.kind, fc.staff_role, fc.note FROM fire_checks fc LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fc.location_id WHERE fc.tenant_id = $1 ORDER BY fc.check_at DESC LIMIT 1000, [tid] ); res.json({ items: rows }); }); /* ---------- Alerts (separate endpoint, no conflict) ---------- */ app.get("/ff/alerts", auth, async (req, res) => { const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req); const tid = tenantIdOf(req); // Defaults const fridgeCfg = { min_c: 2, max_c: 8, due_hours: 24 }; const fireCfg = { panel_days: 7, extinguisher_days: 30, drill_days: 90 }; // Fridge alerts (only for Nursing/Admin) let fridge_due = [], fridge_out_of_range = []; if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING") { const { rows: fridges } = await pool.query( SELECT l.id, l.name, (SELECT temp_c FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_temp, (SELECT taken_at FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_at FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FRIDGE', [tid] ); const minutesSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now()-t)/60000)); }; for (const x of fridges){ if (!x.last_at || minutesSince(x.last_at) > fridgeCfg.due_hours*60){ fridge_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null }); } if (x.last_temp != null){ const t = Number(x.last_temp); if (t < fridgeCfg.min_c || t > fridgeCfg.max_c){ fridge_out_of_range.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null, last_temp_c: t, range:[fridgeCfg.min_c,fridgeCfg.max_c] }); } } } } // Fire alerts (Admin only) let fire_due = [], fire_drill_due = { last_at:null, days_since:null, overdue:false }; if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL") { const daysSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now()-t)/86400000)); }; const { rows: fires } = await pool.query( SELECT l.id, l.name, (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='PANEL' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS panel_at, (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='EXTINGUISHER' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS ext_at FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FIRE', [tid] ); for (const x of fires){ const dp = daysSince(x.panel_at), de = daysSince(x.ext_at); if (!x.panel_at || dp > fireCfg.panel_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"PANEL", days_since: dp }); if (!x.ext_at || de > fireCfg.extinguisher_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"EXTINGUISHER", days_since: de }); } const { rows: lastDrill } = await pool.query("SELECT MAX(check_at) AS last FROM fire_checks WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(kind)='DRILL'", [tid]); const last = lastDrill[0]?.last || null; const daysS = (last ? Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - (+new Date(last)))/86400000)) : null); fire_drill_due = { last_at:last, days_since: daysS, overdue: (daysS!=null ? daysS > fireCfg.drill_days : true) }; } res.json({ fridge_due, fridge_out_of_range, fire_due, fire_drill_due }); }); }; PLEASE DO THE CANGES AS NEEDED FROM ABOVE
ChatGPT said:

You’re close. Your latest plugins/fridge_fire.cjs has two hard blockers:

  1. HK/Maint page (/tap/ci/:token) – JWT is never defined → page can’t call your API.

  2. Fire page (/tap/fire/:token) – the “not signed in” branch doesn’t redirect/return, and the back-button trap only runs in that branch.

Below are exact edits (copy/paste) to this file only.

1) Fridge tap page — read token from either storage + back button to app

File: plugins/fridge_fire.cjs
Section: handler for app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", …)
Inside the <script>(function(){ … })();</script> block:

(A) Replace the JWT line

Find:

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''; }catch(_){}

Replace with:

js
var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || ''); }catch(_){}

(B) Add a back-button trap (insert just after the API/TOKEN lines and before the if(!JWT){…})

Add:

js
var appUrl="/app.html?api="+encodeURIComponent(API||location.origin)+"&nosw=1";
try{
  history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
  addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
}catch(_){}

*(keep the
