  /* ---------- Minimal self /me just for role/category checks ---------- */
  app.get("/ff/me", auth, (req, res) => {
    res.json({ role: req.user?.role || "", category: req.user?.category || "" });
  });

  /* ---------- Common light theme CSS for TAP pages ---------- */
  const TAP_CSS = `
  :root{ --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967; }
  body{
    font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
    max-width:640px; margin:24px auto; padding:0 12px; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text)
  }
  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E;
  }
  button{
    padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; border:0; background:var(--accent); color:#fff;
    font-weight:700; cursor:pointer
  }
  #msg{ margin:10px 0 }
  header { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px }
  header img{ height:56px }
  `;

  function appUrlHTML(api){
    // Always send users back to the SPA at index.html with api param
    const base = "/index.html?api=" + encodeURIComponent(api || "");
    return base;
  }

  /* ---------- Fridge: tap page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim();
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,"") || "";
    res.status(200).type("html").send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Fridge Temp</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  input{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:#2E2E2E}
  .muted{ color:#606060 }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Loading…</div>
  <div class="card">
    <label class="muted">Enter temperature (°C)</label>
    <input id="t" type="number" step="0.1" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="e.g. 5.0">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
      <button id="save">Save</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(appUrlHTML(api||location.origin))};

  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }

  // Back → SPA
  try{
    history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}

  if(!JWT){
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }

  // Only NURSING/Admin can write fridge logs
  fetch((API||'')+"/ff/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}})
   .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
   .then(me=>{
      var r=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(), c=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase();
      if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING")){ setMsg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing."); return; }
      document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){
        var v = parseFloat(document.getElementById('t').value);
        if(!isFinite(v)){ setMsg("Enter a valid number"); return; }
        fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fridge/log",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,temp_c:v})})
          .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
          .then(j=> setMsg("Saved " + v.toFixed(1) + "°C at " + (j.locationName||'fridge') + "."))
          .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
      };
   })
   .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Fire: tap page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/fire/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim();
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,"") || "";
    res.status(200).type("html").send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Fire Check</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  textarea,select{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:#2E2E2E}
  textarea{min-height:88px}
  .muted{ color:#606060 }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Loading…</div>
  <div class="card">
    <label class="muted">What did you check?</label>
    <select id="kind">
      <option value="PANEL">Fire panel</option>
      <option value="EXTINGUISHER">Extinguisher</option>
      <option value="DRILL">Emergency drill completed</option>
    </select>
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Note (optional)</label>
    <textarea id="note" placeholder="e.g. Weekly panel check OK"></textarea>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
      <button id="save">Save</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(appUrlHTML(api||location.origin))};

  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }

  // Back → SPA
  try{
    history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}

  if(!JWT){
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }

  document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){
    var kind = String(document.getElementById('kind').value||'PANEL');
    var note = String(document.getElementById('note').value||'');
    fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fire/check",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,kind:kind,note:note})})
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(j=> setMsg("Saved " + kind + " at " + (j.locationName||'fire location') + "."))
      .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
  };
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Role-aware TAP entry: keeps fridge/fire dedicated pages unchanged ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/u/:token", (req, res) => {
    const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
    res
      .status(200)
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Tap</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  #msg{ padding:12px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--panel); color:#606060 }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Processing…</div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}; if(!API) API = location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(appUrlHTML(api||location.origin))};

  // Back → SPA
  try{
    history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}

  function decodeJwt(t){ try{ var p=t.split('.')[1]||''; while(p.length%4)p+='='; return JSON.parse(atob(p)); }catch(_){ return {}; } }
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }

  if(!JWT){
    setMsg('You are not signed in. Opening the app…');
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }
  var c=decodeJwt(JWT);
  var role=String(c.role||'').toUpperCase();
  var cat =String(c.category||'').toUpperCase();

  var target = (role==='ADMIN' || cat==='AUDITOR') ? '/tap/env/' + TOKEN
            : (cat==='NURSING') ? '/tap/nursing/' + TOKEN
            : '/tap/ci/' + TOKEN;

  location.replace(target);
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Housekeeping / Maintenance TAP page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/ci/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = req.params.token || "";
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
    res
      .status(200)
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Housekeeping</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  .row{ display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end }
  textarea{
    width:100%; min-height:84px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid var(--border);
    background:#fff; color:#2E2E2E; padding:8px;
  }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div>
  <div id="issueBox" class="card" style="display:none;margin-top:10px">
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700">Report maintenance issue</div>
    <textarea id="issueText" placeholder="Describe the problem…"></textarea>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px">
      <button id="btnSendIssue">Send</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>(function(){
  function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; }
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(appUrlHTML(api||location.origin))};

  // Back → SPA
  try{
    history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}

  if(!JWT){
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }

  fetch((API||'') + '/tap/ci/perform',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
    body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})
  })
  .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
  .then(j=>{
    var role=String(j.role||'').toUpperCase();
    var text = j.action==='checkin'
      ? (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning started in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit started in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance started in ':'Checked in at ')
      : (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning finished in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit finished in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance finished in ':'Checked out from ');
    var dur = (j.durationMin!=null && j.action==='checkout') ? (' — duration '+j.durationMin+' min') : '';
    setMsg('✅ '+text+(j.locationName||'this location')+dur);
    show(document.getElementById('issueBox'));
    var btn=document.getElementById('btnSendIssue');
    if(btn) btn.onclick=function(){
      var txt=(document.getElementById('issueText').value||'').trim();
      if(!txt){ setMsg('No issue text entered.'); return; }
      fetch((API||'') + '/issues',{
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
        body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,text:txt})
      })
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(()=>{ setMsg('Issue sent. Thank you!'); document.getElementById('issueText').value='';})
      .catch(e=>setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
    };
  })
  .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Nursing TAP page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = req.params.token || "";
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
    res
      .status(200)
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Nursing</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Logging nursing check…</div>
<script>(function(){
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(appUrlHTML(api||location.origin))};

  // Back → SPA
  try{
    history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}

  if(!JWT){
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }
  fetch((API||'') + '/tap/nursing/check',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
    body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})
  })
  .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
  .then(j=> setMsg('✅ Resident checked at '+(j.locationName||'this location')+'.'))
  .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Admin/Auditor TAP page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/env/:token", (req, res) => {
    const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
    res
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Auditor Tap</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)};
  var API = ""; try{ API=(localStorage.getItem("ernosApi")||location.origin).replace(/\\/+$/,''); }catch(_){}
  var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(appUrlHTML(null))};

  // Back → SPA
  try{
    history.pushState({ernosTap:1},"");
    addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); });
  }catch(_){}

  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  if(!JWT){
    setMsg("You are not signed in. Opening the app…");
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }
  setMsg("Checking permissions…");
  fetch(API + "/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}})
   .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
   .then(me=>{
      var role=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(); var cat=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase();
      if(!(role==="ADMIN"||cat==="AUDITOR")){ location.replace("/tap/u/"+TOKEN); return; }
      var audId=parseInt(localStorage.getItem("ernos_current_audit_id")||"0",10);
      if(!audId){ setMsg("Auditor signed in, but no open audit in this browser. Open the app, click an audit, then tap again."); return; }
      return fetch(API+"/env/tap",{
        method:"POST",
        headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},
        body: JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,auditId:audId})
      })
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(j=> setMsg("Location added to audit: "+(j.locationName||"")+".")); 
   })
   .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Nursing check API (one-shot) ---------- */
  app.post("/tap/nursing/check", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qrRows[0].location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];

      const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0);
      const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]);
      if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" });
      const u = userRows[0];

      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      await pool.query(
        `INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9)`,
        [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, "NURSING", loc.name, tid]
      );
      res.json({ ok: true, locationName: loc.name });
    }catch(e){
      console.error("[tap/nursing/check]", e);
      res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
    }
  });

  /* ---------- HK/Maint toggle perform API ---------- */
  app.post("/tap/ci/perform", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });
      const qr = qrRows[0];

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];

      const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0);
      const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]);
      if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" });
      const u = userRows[0];

      // Toggle: if user has an open checkin at this location -> checkout
      const { rows: openRows } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT * FROM checkins
         WHERE user_id=$1 AND location_id=$2 AND checkout_at IS NULL
         ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1`, [u.id, loc.id]
      );

      if (openRows.length) {
        const open = openRows[0];
        const end = nowISO();
        await pool.query("UPDATE checkins SET checkout_at=$1 WHERE id=$2", [end, open.id]);
        const { rows: d } = await pool.query(
          `SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(checkout_at, NOW()) - checkin_at))/60 AS minutes
           FROM checkins WHERE id=$1`, [open.id]
        );
        const durationMin = d[0]?.minutes != null ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(d[0].minutes))) : null;
        return res.json({
          ok: true,
          action: "checkout",
          role: u.category || "",
          locationName: loc.name,
          started_at: open.checkin_at,
          ended_at: end,
          durationMin,
        });
      }

      // else: check in
      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      const started = nowISO();
      const ins = await pool.query(
        `INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9) RETURNING id`,
        [u.id, loc.id, started, null, "", u.name, String(u.category||""), loc.name, tid]
      );
      return res.json({
        ok: true,
        action: "checkin",
        role: u.category || "",
        locationName: loc.name,
        checkinId: ins.rows[0].id,
        started_at: started,
      });
    }catch(e){
      console.error("[tap/ci/perform]", e);
      res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
    }
  });

  /* ---------- Fridge API ---------- */
  app.post("/ff/fridge/log", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token, temp_c } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const t = Number(temp_c);
      if (!norm || !Number.isFinite(t)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "token and temp_c required" });

      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];
      if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FRIDGE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FRIDGE tag" });

      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase();

      // Access: only NURSING (or Admins) can write
      const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
      if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
        return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
      }

      await pool.query(
        "INSERT INTO fridge_logs(location_id,taken_at,temp_c,staff_role,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5)",
        [loc.id, nowISO(), t, role, tid]
      );
      res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, temp_c: t });
    }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fridge/log]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); }
  });

  app.get("/ff/fridge/logs", auth, async (req, res) => {
    const r = roleOf(req); const c = catOf(req);
    if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
    }
    const tid = tenantIdOf(req);
    const { rows } = await pool.query(
      `SELECT
         fl.id,
         fl.location_id,
         COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fl.location_id) AS location_name,
         fl.taken_at,
         fl.temp_c,
         fl.staff_role
       FROM fridge_logs fl
       LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fl.location_id
       WHERE fl.tenant_id = $1
       ORDER BY fl.taken_at DESC
       LIMIT 1000`,
      [tid]
    );
    res.json({ items: rows });
  });

  /* ---------- Fire API ---------- */
  app.post("/ff/fire/check", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token, kind, note } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const K = String(kind||"PANEL").toUpperCase();
      if (!["PANEL","EXTINGUISHER","DRILL"].includes(K)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "bad kind" });

      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];
      if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FIRE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FIRE tag" });

      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase();

      await pool.query(
        "INSERT INTO fire_checks(location_id,check_at,kind,staff_role,note,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6)",
        [loc.id, nowISO(), K, role, String(note||"").trim(), tid]
      );
      res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, kind: K });
    }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fire/check]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); }
  });

  app.get("/ff/fire/logs", auth, async (req, res) => {
    const r = roleOf(req);
    if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL")) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
    }
    const tid = tenantIdOf(req);
    const { rows } = await pool.query(
      `SELECT
         fc.id,
         fc.location_id,
         COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fc.location_id) AS location_name,
         fc.check_at,
         fc.kind,
         fc.staff_role,
         fc.note
       FROM fire_checks fc
       LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fc.location_id
       WHERE fc.tenant_id = $1
       ORDER BY fc.check_at DESC
       LIMIT 1000`,
      [tid]
    );
    res.json({ items: rows });
  });

  /* ---------- Alerts ---------- */
  app.get("/ff/alerts", auth, async (req, res) => {
    const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
    const tid = tenantIdOf(req);

    const fridgeCfg = { min_c: 2, max_c: 8, due_hours: 24 };
    const fireCfg   = { panel_days: 7, extinguisher_days: 30, drill_days: 90 };

    // Fridge alerts
    let fridge_due = [], fridge_out_of_range = [];
    if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING") {
      const { rows: fridges } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT l.id, l.name,
                (SELECT temp_c FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_temp,
                (SELECT taken_at FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_at
         FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FRIDGE'`, [tid]
      );
      const minutesSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now()-t)/60000)); };
      for (const x of fridges){
        if (!x.last_at || minutesSince(x.last_at) > fridgeCfg.due_hours*60){
          fridge_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null });
        }
        if (x.last_temp != null){
          const t = Number(x.last_temp);
          if (t < fridgeCfg.min_c || t > fridgeCfg.max_c){
            fridge_out_of_range.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null, last_temp_c: t, range:[fridgeCfg.min_c,fridgeCfg.max_c] });
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // Fire alerts
    let fire_due = [], fire_drill_due = { last_at:null, days_since:null, overdue:false };
    if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL") {
      const daysSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now()-t)/86400000)); };
      const { rows: fires } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT l.id, l.name,
                (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='PANEL' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS panel_at,
                (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='EXTINGUISHER' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS ext_at
         FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FIRE'`, [tid]
      );
      for (const x of fires){
        const dp = daysSince(x.panel_at), de = daysSince(x.ext_at);
        if (!x.panel_at || dp > fireCfg.panel_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"PANEL", days_since: dp });
        if (!x.ext_at   || de > fireCfg.extinguisher_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"EXTINGUISHER", days_since: de });
      }
      const { rows: lastDrill } = await pool.query("SELECT MAX(check_at) AS last FROM fire_checks WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(kind)='DRILL'", [tid]);
      const last = lastDrill[0]?.last || null;
      const daysS = (last ? Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - (+new Date(last)))/86400000)) : null);
      fire_drill_due = { last_at:last, days_since: daysS, overdue: (daysS!=null ? daysS > fireCfg.drill_days : true) };
    }

    res.json({ fridge_due, fridge_out_of_range, fire_due, fire_drill_due });
  });

};

What changed (quick validation checklist):

  • Every TAP page computes appUrl = "/index.html?api=..." and sends Back there.

  • history.pushState + popstate → location.replace(appUrl) on all TAP pages.

  • JWT read as sessionStorage || localStorage on all TAP pages.

  • If not signed in, TAP pages set ernos_return_to and redirect to index (your SPA already bounces back to the TAP URL after login).

  • Role router /tap/u/:token still sends Admin/Auditor → env, Nursing → nursing, everyone else → housekeeping/maintenance toggle.

Drop this file in, restart your server, and ensure your QR codes for staff are pointing to /tap/u/:token (the Auto link).

You said:
OK, THIS TIME AT LEAST BROGHT ME TO THE PAGE BACK BUT IT DOES NOT KEEPSIGNED IN AT ALL, THIS IS SO ANNOYING LIKE..aLSO THERE IS MESSAGE ON THE BOTTOM OF THE SCREEN SAYING PRESS BACK AGAIN TO EXIT, THAT SHOULD NOT BE THERE...SO WHOW CAN WE MAKE IT THAT ONCE IT IS SIGNED IN IT STAYES SIGNED IN LIKE THIS WAY NOBODY WILL BE ABLE TO USE IT AT ALL...CHECK SERVER.PG.CJS ADN EVERYTHING ELSE IS IT CORRCT
ChatGPT said:
You said:
HOLD ON WHAT I ACTUALLY REALIZED IS THATON THE TOP OF THE SCREEN IT WILL SAY RIGHT USER AND ROLE AND SITE BUT IT BRING TO SIGN IN PAGE EVRY TIME WHEN YOU TAP OUT I MEAN SE WHEN YOU TAP AND YOU WANT TO CGO BACK TO THE APP IT BRINGS TO SIGN IN PAGE AGAIN SO IT NEEDS TO BE CHECKED...ALSO ON THE PHONE WHEN SIGNED AS USER HOUSEKEEPING I SHOULD SEE ROOMS IN GREEN IF CLEANED IN RED IF NOT CLEAN AND TH EOTHER WHAT HOUSEKEEPING SHOULD SEE IS TO REPORT MAINTANCE ISSUE NOTHING ELSE, THEY DO NOT NEED FRIDGE ADN FIRE ONES TO BE ON THE PAGE...ALERTS SHOULD BE ONLY ROOMS NOT CLEANED LIKE
ChatGPT said:

Thanks for the detail — I see two separate problems:

  1. you are signed in (header shows the right user), but the SPA still drops you on #login when you return from a TAP page

  2. the “press back again to exit” toast is showing

  3. housekeeping needs its own, super-simple view (rooms green/red + “report maintenance issue”), with no fridge/fire

Below I’m giving you copy-paste changes that fix all 3. It’s two parts:

1) Update plugins/fridge_fire.cjs (copy–paste)

This is your plugin with one new endpoint for the housekeeping view:

  • GET /hk/rooms — returns every ROOM and the latest housekeeping status so the SPA can color them green/red/in-progress.

Replace your existing plugins/fridge_fire.cjs with this whole file:

js
// plugins/fridge_fire.cjs
module.exports = function setupFridgeFire(opts){
  const {
    app, pool, auth,
    PUBLIC_API_URL = "",
    // Optional helpers from your server; we polyfill if missing:
    nowISO      = () => new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d{3}Z$/, "Z"),
    tenantIdOf  = (req) => Number(req.user?.tenant_id || 0),
    roleOf      = (req) => String(req.user?.role||"").toUpperCase(),
    catOf       = (req)  => String(req.user?.category||"").toUpperCase(),
  } = opts || {};

  if (!app || !pool || !auth) {
    throw new Error("[fridge_fire] Missing required { app, pool, auth }");
  }

  /* ---------- Migrations (idempotent) ---------- */
  async function migrate(){
    const sql = `
    -- Fridge temperature logs
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fridge_logs (
      id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
      taken_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      temp_c NUMERIC,
      staff_role TEXT,
      tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id)
    );
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fridge_loc_time ON fridge_logs(location_id, taken_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fridge_tenant   ON fridge_logs(tenant_id);

    -- Housekeeping / Maintenance / Nursing check-ins (toggle)
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS checkins (
      id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
      location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
      checkin_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
      checkout_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      note TEXT,
      user_name TEXT,
      user_category TEXT,
      location_name TEXT,
      tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id)
    );
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_user_open ON checkins(user_id, location_id) WHERE checkout_at IS NULL;
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_checkins_tenant ON checkins(tenant_id);

    -- Fire safety checks
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fire_checks (
      id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      location_id INTEGER REFERENCES locations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
      check_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      kind TEXT,              -- PANEL | EXTINGUISHER | DRILL
      staff_role TEXT,
      note TEXT,
      tenant_id INTEGER REFERENCES tenants(id)
    );
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fire_loc_time ON fire_checks(location_id, check_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fire_tenant   ON fire_checks(tenant_id);
    `;
    await pool.query(sql);
  }
  migrate().catch(e => console.error("[fridge_fire migrate]", e));

  /* ---------- Small helper ---------- */
  function normalizeToken(raw){
    let t = String(raw || "").trim();
    try { t = decodeURIComponent(t); } catch {}
    if (t.startsWith("#")) t = t.slice(1);
    if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(t)) { const parts = t.split("#"); t = parts[1] || t.split("/").pop(); }
    if (t.includes("/")) t = t.split("/").pop();
    return t;
  }

  /* ---------- Minimal self /me just for role/category checks ---------- */
  app.get("/ff/me", auth, (req, res) => {
    res.json({ role: req.user?.role || "", category: req.user?.category || "" });
  });

  /* ---------- Shared light theme + SPA index redirect for TAP pages ---------- */
  const TAP_CSS = `
  :root{ --bg:#4E6E81; --panel:#FFFFFF; --text:#EAF1F4; --muted:#D7E3E8; --accent:#7BA297; --border:#3E5967; }
  body{
    font:15px system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
    max-width:640px; margin:24px auto; padding:0 12px; background:var(--bg); color:var(--text)
  }
  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(20,31,50,.06); color:#2E2E2E;
  }
  button{
    padding:10px 14px; border-radius:10px; border:0; background:var(--accent); color:#fff;
    font-weight:700; cursor:pointer
  }
  #msg{ margin:10px 0 }
  header { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px }
  header img{ height:56px }
  `;
  const toAppUrl = (api) => "/index.html?api=" + encodeURIComponent(api || "");

  /* ---------- Fridge: tap page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/fridge/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim();
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,"") || "";
    res.status(200).type("html").send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Fridge Temp</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  input{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:#2E2E2E}
  .muted{ color:#606060 }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Loading…</div>
  <div class="card">
    <label class="muted">Enter temperature (°C)</label>
    <input id="t" type="number" step="0.1" inputmode="decimal" placeholder="e.g. 5.0">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
      <button id="save">Save</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(toAppUrl(api||location.origin))};
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  try{ history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){}
  if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){ } location.replace(appUrl); return; }
  fetch((API||'')+"/ff/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}})
   .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
   .then(me=>{
      var r=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(), c=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase();
      if(!(r==="ADMIN"||r==="ADMIN_GLOBAL"||c==="NURSING")){ setMsg("Access denied: fridge logging is for Nursing."); return; }
      document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){
        var v=parseFloat(document.getElementById('t').value);
        if(!isFinite(v)){ setMsg("Enter a valid number"); return; }
        fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fridge/log",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,temp_c:v})})
         .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
         .then(j=> setMsg("Saved " + v.toFixed(1) + "°C at " + (j.locationName||'fridge') + "."))
         .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
      };
   })
   .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Fire: tap page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/fire/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = String(req.params.token||"").trim();
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "").replace(/\/+$/,"") || "";
    res.status(200).type("html").send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Fire Check</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  textarea,select{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;color:#2E2E2E}
  textarea{min-height:88px}
  .muted{ color:#606060 }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Loading…</div>
  <div class="card">
    <label class="muted">What did you check?</label>
    <select id="kind">
      <option value="PANEL">Fire panel</option>
      <option value="EXTINGUISHER">Extinguisher</option>
      <option value="DRILL">Emergency drill completed</option>
    </select>
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Note (optional)</label>
    <textarea id="note" placeholder="e.g. Weekly panel check OK"></textarea>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
      <button id="save">Save</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(toAppUrl(api||location.origin))};
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  try{ history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){}
  if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){ } location.replace(appUrl); return; }
  document.getElementById('save').onclick=function(){
    var kind=String(document.getElementById('kind').value||'PANEL');
    var note=String(document.getElementById('note').value||'');
    fetch((API||'')+"/ff/fire/check",{method:"POST",headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,kind:kind,note:note})})
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(j=> setMsg("Saved " + kind + " at " + (j.locationName||'fire location') + "."))
      .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
  };
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Role-aware TAP entry ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/u/:token", (req, res) => {
    const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
    res
      .status(200)
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html>
<html lang="en"><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Tap</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  #msg{ padding:12px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--panel); color:#606060 }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Processing…</div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)};
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}; if(!API) API = location.origin;
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(toAppUrl(api||location.origin))};
  try{ history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){}
  function decodeJwt(t){ try{ var p=t.split('.')[1]||''; while(p.length%4)p+='='; return JSON.parse(atob(p)); }catch(_){ return {}; } }
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  if(!JWT){
    setMsg('You are not signed in. Opening the app…');
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }
  var c=decodeJwt(JWT);
  var role=String(c.role||'').toUpperCase();
  var cat =String(c.category||'').toUpperCase();
  var target = (role==='ADMIN' || cat==='AUDITOR') ? '/tap/env/' + TOKEN
            : (cat==='NURSING') ? '/tap/nursing/' + TOKEN
            : '/tap/ci/' + TOKEN;
  location.replace(target);
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Housekeeping / Maintenance TAP page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/ci/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = req.params.token || "";
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
    res
      .status(200)
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Housekeeping</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}
  .row{ display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end }
  textarea{
    width:100%; min-height:84px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid var(--border);
    background:#fff; color:#2E2E2E; padding:8px;
  }
</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div>
  <div id="issueBox" class="card" style="display:none;margin-top:10px">
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px;font-weight:700">Report maintenance issue</div>
    <textarea id="issueText" placeholder="Describe the problem…"></textarea>
    <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px">
      <button id="btnSendIssue">Send</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>(function(){
  function show(el){ if(el) el.style.display=''; }
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin;
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(toAppUrl(api||location.origin))};
  try{ history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){}
  if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){ } location.replace(appUrl); return; }

  fetch((API||'') + '/tap/ci/perform',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
    body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})
  })
  .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
  .then(j=>{
    var role=String(j.role||'').toUpperCase();
    var text = j.action==='checkin'
      ? (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning started in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit started in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance started in ':'Checked in at ')
      : (role==='HOUSEKEEPING'?'Cleaning finished in ': role==='NURSING'?'Visit finished in ': role==='MAINTENANCE'?'Maintenance finished in ':'Checked out from ');
    var dur = (j.durationMin!=null && j.action==='checkout') ? (' — duration '+j.durationMin+' min') : '';
    setMsg('✅ '+text+(j.locationName||'this location')+dur);
    show(document.getElementById('issueBox'));
    var btn=document.getElementById('btnSendIssue');
    if(btn) btn.onclick=function(){
      var txt=(document.getElementById('issueText').value||'').trim();
      if(!txt){ setMsg('No issue text entered.'); return; }
      fetch((API||'') + '/issues',{
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
        body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,text:txt})
      })
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(()=>{ setMsg('Issue sent. Thank you!'); document.getElementById('issueText').value='';})
      .catch(e=>setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
    };
  })
  .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Nursing TAP page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/nursing/:token", (req, res) => {
    const token = req.params.token || "";
    const api = (PUBLIC_API_URL || "");
    res
      .status(200)
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Nursing</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Logging nursing check…</div>
<script>(function(){
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  var API=${JSON.stringify(api)}||location.origin; var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(token)};
  var JWT=''; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')||''); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(toAppUrl(api||location.origin))};
  try{ history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){}
  if(!JWT){ try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){ } location.replace(appUrl); return; }
  fetch((API||'') + '/tap/nursing/check',{
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':'Bearer '+JWT},
    body:JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN})
  })
  .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
  .then(j=> setMsg('✅ Resident checked at '+(j.locationName||'this location')+'.'))
  .catch(e=> setMsg('Failed: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Admin/Auditor TAP page ---------- */
  app.get("/tap/env/:token", (req, res) => {
    const tok = String(req.params.token || "").trim();
    res
      .type("html")
      .send(`<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<title>Ernos • Auditor Tap</title>
<style>${TAP_CSS}</style>
<body>
  <header><img src="/skin/icons/logo.png" alt="Ernos" onerror="this.src='/skin/icons/icon.svg'"></header>
  <div id="msg" class="card">Contacting server…</div>
<script>(function(){
  var TOKEN=${JSON.stringify(tok)};
  var API = ""; try{ API=(localStorage.getItem("ernosApi")||location.origin).replace(/\\/+$/,''); }catch(_){}
  var JWT = ""; try{ JWT=(sessionStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||localStorage.getItem("ernosToken")||""); }catch(_){}
  var appUrl=${JSON.stringify(toAppUrl(null))};
  try{ history.pushState({ernosTap:1},""); addEventListener("popstate", function(){ location.replace(appUrl); }); }catch(_){}
  function setMsg(t){ var el=document.getElementById('msg'); el.textContent=t; }
  if(!JWT){
    setMsg("You are not signed in. Opening the app…");
    try{ localStorage.setItem('ernos_return_to', location.href); }catch(_){}
    location.replace(appUrl);
    return;
  }
  setMsg("Checking permissions…");
  fetch(API + "/me",{headers:{'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT}})
   .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
   .then(me=>{
      var role=String(me.role||"").toUpperCase(); var cat=String(me.category||"").toUpperCase();
      if(!(role==="ADMIN"||cat==="AUDITOR")){ location.replace("/tap/u/"+TOKEN); return; }
      var audId=parseInt(localStorage.getItem("ernos_current_audit_id")||"0",10);
      if(!audId){ setMsg("Auditor signed in, but no open audit in this browser. Open the app, click an audit, then tap again."); return; }
      return fetch(API+"/env/tap",{
        method:"POST",
        headers:{'Content-Type':"application/json",'Authorization':"Bearer "+JWT},
        body: JSON.stringify({token:TOKEN,auditId:audId})
      })
      .then(r=>r.json().then(j=>{ if(!r.ok) throw new Error(j&&j.error||('HTTP '+r.status)); return j; }))
      .then(j=> setMsg("Location added to audit: "+(j.locationName||"")+".")); 
   })
   .catch(e=> setMsg(e.message||String(e)));
})();</script></body></html>`);
  });

  /* ---------- Nursing check API (one-shot) ---------- */
  app.post("/tap/nursing/check", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qrRows[0].location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];

      const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0);
      const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]);
      if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" });
      const u = userRows[0];

      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      await pool.query(
        `INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9)`,
        [u.id, loc.id, nowISO(), null, "", u.name, "NURSING", loc.name, tid]
      );
      res.json({ ok: true, locationName: loc.name });
    }catch(e){
      console.error("[tap/nursing/check]", e);
      res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
    }
  });

  /* ---------- HK/Maint toggle perform API ---------- */
  app.post("/tap/ci/perform", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1", [norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });
      const qr = qrRows[0];

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM locations WHERE id=$1", [qr.location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];

      const userId = Number(req.user?.id || req.user?.user_id || 0);
      const { rows: userRows } = await pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1", [userId]);
      if (!userRows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: "no user" });
      const u = userRows[0];

      // Toggle: if user has an open checkin at this location -> checkout
      const { rows: openRows } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT * FROM checkins
         WHERE user_id=$1 AND location_id=$2 AND checkout_at IS NULL
         ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1`, [u.id, loc.id]
      );

      if (openRows.length) {
        const open = openRows[0];
        const end = nowISO();
        await pool.query("UPDATE checkins SET checkout_at=$1 WHERE id=$2", [end, open.id]);
        const { rows: d } = await pool.query(
          `SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(checkout_at, NOW()) - checkin_at))/60 AS minutes
           FROM checkins WHERE id=$1`, [open.id]
        );
        const durationMin = d[0]?.minutes != null ? Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(d[0].minutes))) : null;
        return res.json({
          ok: true,
          action: "checkout",
          role: u.category || "",
          locationName: loc.name,
          started_at: open.checkin_at,
          ended_at: end,
          durationMin,
        });
      }

      // else: check in
      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      const started = nowISO();
      const ins = await pool.query(
        `INSERT INTO checkins(user_id,location_id,checkin_at,checkout_at,note,user_name,user_category,location_name,tenant_id)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9) RETURNING id`,
        [u.id, loc.id, started, null, "", u.name, String(u.category||""), loc.name, tid]
      );
      return res.json({
        ok: true,
        action: "checkin",
        role: u.category || "",
        locationName: loc.name,
        checkinId: ins.rows[0].id,
        started_at: started,
      });
    }catch(e){
      console.error("[tap/ci/perform]", e);
      res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
    }
  });

  /* ---------- NEW: Housekeeping Rooms status for SPA ---------- */
  app.get("/hk/rooms", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const tid = tenantIdOf(req);
      const { rows } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT l.id, l.name,
                -- most recent HK checkin & checkout (independent)
                (SELECT c.checkin_at  FROM checkins c
                  WHERE c.location_id=l.id AND UPPER(c.user_category)='HOUSEKEEPING'
                  ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_checkin,
                (SELECT c.checkout_at FROM checkins c
                  WHERE c.location_id=l.id AND UPPER(c.user_category)='HOUSEKEEPING'
                  ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_checkout,
                -- any open HK check at this room?
                EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM checkins c
                  WHERE c.location_id=l.id AND UPPER(c.user_category)='HOUSEKEEPING'
                    AND c.checkout_at IS NULL) AS in_progress
         FROM locations l
         WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='ROOM'
         ORDER BY l.name`,
        [tid]
      );
      res.json({ items: rows });
    }catch(e){
      console.error("[hk/rooms]", e);
      res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" });
    }
  });

  /* ---------- Fridge API ---------- */
  app.post("/ff/fridge/log", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token, temp_c } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const t = Number(temp_c);
      if (!norm || !Number.isFinite(t)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "token and temp_c required" });

      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];
      if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FRIDGE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FRIDGE tag" });

      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase();

      const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
      if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
        return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
      }

      await pool.query(
        "INSERT INTO fridge_logs(location_id,taken_at,temp_c,staff_role,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5)",
        [loc.id, nowISO(), t, role, tid]
      );
      res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, temp_c: t });
    }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fridge/log]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); }
  });

  app.get("/ff/fridge/logs", auth, async (req, res) => {
    const r = roleOf(req); const c = catOf(req);
    if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING")) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
    }
    const tid = tenantIdOf(req);
    const { rows } = await pool.query(
      `SELECT
         fl.id,
         fl.location_id,
         COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fl.location_id) AS location_name,
         fl.taken_at,
         fl.temp_c,
         fl.staff_role
       FROM fridge_logs fl
       LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fl.location_id
       WHERE fl.tenant_id = $1
       ORDER BY fl.taken_at DESC
       LIMIT 1000`,
      [tid]
    );
    res.json({ items: rows });
  });

  /* ---------- Fire API ---------- */
  app.post("/ff/fire/check", auth, async (req, res) => {
    try{
      const { token, kind, note } = req.body || {};
      const norm = normalizeToken(token || "");
      const K = String(kind||"PANEL").toUpperCase();
      if (!["PANEL","EXTINGUISHER","DRILL"].includes(K)) return res.status(400).json({ error: "bad kind" });

      const { rows: qrRows } = await pool.query("SELECT location_id FROM qrcodes WHERE token=$1",[norm]);
      if (!qrRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "bad token" });

      const { rows: locRows } = await pool.query("SELECT id,name,type,tenant_id FROM locations WHERE id=$1",[qrRows[0].location_id]);
      if (!locRows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: "no location" });
      const loc = locRows[0];
      if (String(loc.type||"").toUpperCase()!=="FIRE") return res.status(400).json({ error: "not a FIRE tag" });

      const tid = loc.tenant_id || tenantIdOf(req);
      const role = String(req.user?.category || req.user?.role || "").toUpperCase();

      await pool.query(
        "INSERT INTO fire_checks(location_id,check_at,kind,staff_role,note,tenant_id) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6)",
        [loc.id, nowISO(), K, role, String(note||"").trim(), tid]
      );
      res.json({ ok:true, locationName: loc.name, kind: K });
    }catch(e){ console.error("[ff fire/check]", e); res.status(500).json({ error: "server error" }); }
  });

  app.get("/ff/fire/logs", auth, async (req, res) => {
    const r = roleOf(req);
    if (!(r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL")) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: "forbidden" });
    }
    const tid = tenantIdOf(req);
    const { rows } = await pool.query(
      `SELECT
         fc.id,
         fc.location_id,
         COALESCE(l.name, 'Location #' || fc.location_id) AS location_name,
         fc.check_at,
         fc.kind,
         fc.staff_role,
         fc.note
       FROM fire_checks fc
       LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = fc.location_id
       WHERE fc.tenant_id = $1
       ORDER BY fc.check_at DESC
       LIMIT 1000`,
      [tid]
    );
    res.json({ items: rows });
  });

  /* ---------- Alerts ---------- */
  app.get("/ff/alerts", auth, async (req, res) => {
    const r = roleOf(req), c = catOf(req);
    const tid = tenantIdOf(req);

    const fridgeCfg = { min_c: 2, max_c: 8, due_hours: 24 };
    const fireCfg   = { panel_days: 7, extinguisher_days: 30, drill_days: 90 };

    let fridge_due = [], fridge_out_of_range = [];
    if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL" || c === "NURSING") {
      const { rows: fridges } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT l.id, l.name,
                (SELECT temp_c FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_temp,
                (SELECT taken_at FROM fridge_logs WHERE location_id=l.id ORDER BY taken_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_at
         FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FRIDGE'`, [tid]
      );
      const minutesSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now()-t)/60000)); };
      for (const x of fridges){
        if (!x.last_at || minutesSince(x.last_at) > fridgeCfg.due_hours*60){
          fridge_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null });
        }
        if (x.last_temp != null){
          const t = Number(x.last_temp);
          if (t < fridgeCfg.min_c || t > fridgeCfg.max_c){
            fridge_out_of_range.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, last_at:x.last_at||null, last_temp_c: t, range:[fridgeCfg.min_c,fridgeCfg.max_c] });
          }
        }
      }
    }

    let fire_due = [], fire_drill_due = { last_at:null, days_since:null, overdue:false };
    if (r === "ADMIN" || r === "ADMIN_GLOBAL") {
      const daysSince = (d)=>{ if(!d) return Infinity; const t=+new Date(d); if(isNaN(t)) return Infinity; return Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now()-t)/86400000)); };
      const { rows: fires } = await pool.query(
        `SELECT l.id, l.name,
                (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='PANEL' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS panel_at,
                (SELECT check_at FROM fire_checks WHERE location_id=l.id AND UPPER(kind)='EXTINGUISHER' ORDER BY check_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS ext_at
         FROM locations l WHERE l.tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(l.type)='FIRE'`, [tid]
      );
      for (const x of fires){
        const dp = daysSince(x.panel_at), de = daysSince(x.ext_at);
        if (!x.panel_at || dp > fireCfg.panel_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"PANEL", days_since: dp });
        if (!x.ext_at   || de > fireCfg.extinguisher_days) fire_due.push({ location_id:x.id, location_name:x.name, kind:"EXTINGUISHER", days_since: de });
      }
      const { rows: lastDrill } = await pool.query("SELECT MAX(check_at) AS last FROM fire_checks WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND UPPER(kind)='DRILL'", [tid]);
      const last = lastDrill[0]?.last || null;
      const daysS = (last ? Math.max(0, Math.floor((Date.now() - (+new Date(last)))/86400000)) : null);
      fire_drill_due = { last_at:last, days_since: daysS, overdue: (daysS!=null ? daysS > fireCfg.drill_days : true) };
    }

    res.json({ fridge_due, fridge_out_of_range, fire_due, fire_drill_due });
  });

};

2) Patch your index.html (exact, small changes)

You don’t need to replace the whole file. Make these five edits:

A) Default to dashboard when a token exists (prevents being sent to #login)

Find (in the “Boot” section):

js
if(!location.hash) navTo('#login');

Replace with:

js
if (!location.hash) navTo(state.token ? '#dashboard' : '#login');

B) Bounce back from #login if you already have a token

Find the start of async function route(){ and the first lines that compute raw / hashOnly.
Immediately after those lines, insert:

js
if (hashOnly === '#login' && state.token) { navTo('#dashboard'); return; }

C) When returning from a TAP page, accept tokens in sessionStorage too

Find (inside DOMContentLoaded boot code):

js
const ret = localStorage.getItem('ernos_return_to');
if (ret && localStorage.getItem('ernosToken')) {

Replace with:

js
const ret = localStorage.getItem('ernos_return_to');
const hasTok = (sessionStorage.getItem('ernosToken') || localStorage.getItem('ernosToken'));
if (ret && hasTok) {

D) Remove the “Press back again to exit” toast

Delete the entire <script>(function () { /* back guard + toast */ })();</script> block near the bottom of the page.
(That’s the script that pushes a guard state and shows “Press back again to exit”.)

E) Housekeeping-only view + nav (green/red rooms + report issue; no fridge/fire)

  1. Replace your renderNav() with this version:

js
function renderNav(){
  const nav=$('#nav'); if(!nav) return;
  const r=(state.me?.role||'').toUpperCase();
  const c=(state.me?.category||'').toUpperCase();
  const isAdmin=(r==='ADMIN'||r==='ADMIN_GLOBAL');
  const isNursing=(c==='NURSING');
  const isHK=(c==='HOUSEKEEPING');

  const items = isHK
    ? [
        ['#hk','Housekeeping'],
        ['#settings','Settings']
      ]
    : [
        ['#dashboard','Dashboard'],
        ...(isAdmin ? [['#staff','Staff & Roles']] : []),
        ...(isNursing || isAdmin ? [['#fridge','Fridge Logs']] : []),
        ...(isAdmin ? [['#fire','Fire Logs']] : []),
        // Visitors / Issues kept for admin/ops, not for HK:
        ...(!isHK ? [['#visitors','Visitors']] : []),
        ...(!isHK ? [['#issues','Maintenance Issues']] : []),
        ...(isAdmin ? [['#locations','Locations']] : []),
        ...(isAdmin ? [['#qrcodes','QR Codes']] : []),
        // FF Alerts only for Nursing/Admin:
        ...((isNursing || isAdmin) ? [['#ffalerts','Alerts (Fridge & Fire)']] : []),
        ...((isAdmin || c==='AUDITOR') ? [['#env','Environmental Audit']] : []),
        ['#settings','Settings']
      ];

  nav.innerHTML = items.map(([href,label])=>`<a href="${href}" data-link>${label}</a>`).join('');
  $$('a[data-link]',nav).forEach(a=>{
    a.classList.toggle('active', location.hash===a.getAttribute('href'));
    a.onclick = e=>{ e.preventDefault(); navTo(a.getAttribute('href')); closeSidebar() };
  });
}

  1. Add this new Housekeeping view anywhere with your other view functions:

js
async function viewHK(){
  setCrumbs('Housekeeping');
  $('#view').innerHTML = `
    <div class="card"><h2>Rooms</h2>
      <div class="row" style="margin-bottom:10px"><button id="refreshHK" class="btn ghost small">Refresh</button></div>
      <div id="hkRooms"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card"><h2>Report maintenance issue</h2>
      <textarea id="hkIssue" class="input" placeholder="Describe the problem…"></textarea>
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:8px">
        <button id="hkSend" class="btn">Send</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  function isToday(d){
    if(!d) return false;
    const x = new Date(d); if (isNaN(+x)) return false;
    const now = new Date();
    return x.getFullYear()===now.getFullYear() && x.getMonth()===now.getMonth() && x.getDate()===now.getDate();
  }

  function renderRooms(items){
    if(!items || !items.length){
      $('#hkRooms').innerHTML = `<div class="empty">No rooms found.</div>`;
      return;
    }
    const rows = items.map(r=>{
      const inprog = !!r.in_progress;
      const cleanedToday = !inprog && r.last_checkout && isToday(r.last_checkout);
      let badge = cleanedToday ? '✅ Cleaned' : (inprog ? '🟡 In progress' : '🔴 Not cleaned');
      return `<tr>
        <td>${escapeHtml(r.name||'')}</td>
        <td>${r.last_checkout ? escapeHtml(fmtDT(r.last_checkout)) : '—'}</td>
        <td>${badge}</td>
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
    $('#hkRooms').innerHTML = `
      <div class="table-wrap">
        <table class="table nolines">
          <thead><tr><th>Room</th><th>Last cleaned</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
        </table>
      </div>`;
  }

  async function load(){
    try{
      const j = await api('/hk/rooms');
      renderRooms(j.items||[]);
    }catch(e){
      $('#hkRooms').innerHTML = `<div class="empty">Failed to load: ${escapeHtml(e.message||String(e))}</div>`;
    }
  }

  $('#refreshHK').onclick = load;
  $('#hkSend').onclick = async ()=>{
    const txt = ($('#hkIssue').value||'').trim();
    if(!txt){ showMsg('Please write the issue first.','err'); return; }
    try{
      await api('/issues',{ method:'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ text: txt }) });
      $('#hkIssue').value=''; showMsg('Issue sent.','ok');
    }catch(e){ showMsg(e.message||String(e),'err'); }
  };

  load();
}

  1. Hook it into the router (add a case):

Find the big switch(hashOnly){ and add:

js
case '#hk':       return viewHK();

F) (tiny polish) Let Enter key submit the login form

Inside viewLogin() after you set $('#loginBtn').onclick = async () => { ... }, add:

js
['#email','#password'].forEach(sel=>{
  const el = $(sel);
  el && el.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{
    if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); $('#loginBtn').click(); }
  });
});

Why this fixes your complaints

  • You were logged in; the SPA was just forcing #login on a cold load with no hash.
    Fix A + B keep you on #dashboard when a token exists, and bounce you off #login immediately if you’re already signed in.

  • Returning from a TAP page previously checked only localStorage for a token.
    Fix C also accepts sessionStorage, so “Keep me signed in” OFF still works.

  • That “Press back again to exit” overlay is from a little history guard script.
    Fix D removes it.

  • Housekeeping UI is now minimal: rooms green/red + report issue, nothing about fridges/fire.
    Fix E adds a clean HK page and hides extra nav for HK users.

  • Hitting Enter on the login form now works.
    Fix F binds Enter to the login button.

If anything else still feels off after these, paste your current index.html again and I’ll line-edit it to match the patches exactly.

GOOD IT WORKS BUT, ON

ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info. See Cookie Preferences.
